sessions/epitaph-protocol/session-3.html.title: Session 3
sessions/epitaph-protocol/session-3.html.description:
Prev: Session 2
Next: Session 4
Thorne, The Dredge
Dwarf Korrim Vale shows up with 2 giant bottles of vodka Hes gonna light up
He says that we are gonna be used as witnesses to Siryu doing this “Im gonna go delete security footage.” Al: how much insurance?
“Itll just go to his family, not me.” Al: tell you what, we’ll look around and decide just how much “Im just gonna go destroy the security footage and you think about it”
Ayla “we dont need to do that. Nivaya can just go back to their parents” (Nivaya's Mom, Nivaya's Dad)
“It would kill you too, and youre too much of an asset you could work for me, we could split the pay. Im sure Aetherion Corporation would love to have an in with a royal family. An iconoclast.” What?????? AS: how much are you being paid to retrieve nivaya?
“Credits? 50k. And an in with a meeting with the Camacho Family.” N: isnt there something we could work out? We help you, you help us out by letting me go?
“I work with the Hynarion Circle.”
Iconoclast are religious family that are scholars that go against the norm to create evolution in the empire, whatever the major party is they are trained to oppose it. Perma devils advocate. Argue in political sphere all go to nice colleges Circle = Shrub Mob, druid mafia Their leader has arranged with things that are impossible to arrange with, doing biodiversity before space travel was common. Dirt and plants if you blow them up, they help the ecosystem, incredibly hostile to people who hop on them without proper clearance. Shrub mob has somehow gotten that clearance “So. why not go back to mom and pa?” N: you mentioned you owe the hynarion circle, could we help?
(Theyre looking with an in with the Concord of Aedryn. You could very much help with that) “Listen. Youre not gonna escape me. You can disguise yourself as much as you want and i’ll still find you. Youre going around with 2 neon blue haired… people?” Al: im marked as equipment Xep: oh same “Then you understand this is just a job, i have to make a living out of it. Im just gonna follow you around, and should the guard drop, then i’ll get you. Ive already found the ones who are willing to kill you.” “Do you think the aetherion corp will like the news of the assassination of an embassy leader’s child.” (xep is playing minesweeper and has a gun to nivaya’s head)
Lights flicker, tv turns on, shows a bit of Kiliv-VI with the egg Phones go off with salacious ads and porn It is entirely possible we had a phantom message in that closet we opened. Those bots jammed signals until they were dead
(ads about The Serenade) During the disappearance, many board members went missing and were lost. This was later created by the great uplifting that shows that people can always go up higher than they were. She looks down at her own phone “Ill leave you alone for now. Youre free to go over, the plants will whisper to me, and the fish.” Xep: birds? “I’ve never seen the birds.” (this world is 0.1% too heavy for birds) N: oh ok. Uh. lets go ASPER sees an injured dog Heals it 26: GREETINGS MORTAL WE ARE THE 26 ALWS OF POWER “I know jackass. Your companion is much kinder.” 26: what should we call you? “Ayla.” 26: travelling companions. We have determined that this dog is the bounty hunter. Miku maps lead us to the right place, approach a governmental building Gov building Approach the clerk, veskian, has tusk Asper registers as friend to visit siryu Through a speaker, make contact with her Smiles “ive finally been arrested for something I didn’t do” A: that is not as reassuring as one would hope “Then evidence will come up that i didn’t do it. That’s what ur god believes right? A: what happened? We went to the dredge “I went to find somewhere to get a drink with people like me. Instead i found a stage with a murdered body and the police had been called as soon as i arrived. I attempted to (and i swear) figure out what was wrong and my gun went off on its own A: how does that happen? “Idk, a policeman tackled me right after. They tased me and pepper sprayed me 5 times A: that’s so cruel. Are you alright now? Beyond being contained? “That’s a lot to go beyond but no immediate danger. Trial is slated for 1 revolution or 60 days A: I shall do my best to ensure that nothing comes of this. I believe that there is a bigger conspiracy at hand Cameras and people all around us. No weapons or implements
“If there’s a conspiracy I know one that could tell u about it. One Velu Shineleaf A: velu shineleaf? “A halfling, one of the moon people.” Come from a humanoid moon A: I will do my best to try and find out what this velu shineleaf might know. Is there anything that I can do while ur in there and im out here? “Find evidence to free me, investigate the stage maybe? A: where is this stage? I understand there’s a bar but there’s no stage “Well i tried to go to the bar and wound up at the stage
A: maybe if we go to the bar we’ll wind up at the stage? Well I will do my best to find out the truth. May aeryn-vox guide me. And if i find anything i’ll come back as soon as possibly Time is up and both are pulled away. We can come back tomorrow for 5 more minutes Ayla shows up with a car “Nivaya would you like a ride to not be in the rain?” N: no im good Walking, the car slowly follows Cars behind her the whole time, holding up traffic
Heading to the stage Incredibly drunk and less than reputable people stuck outside, confused Entire area has already been recorded Stage is right there, you arent allowed to use it before the murder has been solved or it was cleared Cops here to stop people from going in, we’re allowed to go past, we’re the people on the venue ticket Al: whos in charge here?
“That would be the Kalo (Kalo Cop).” Weird aquatic man floating staring down “He was murdered yesterday.” 26: greetings we are the 26 laws of power “You are the one that is friend of siryu?” “That person you travel with is friend, murder, stage owner.” Al: yeah idc abt her, it wont affect my impartiality M: HIII!! “You are much more likeable than the other one.” M: ill take it as a compliment! “Not big compliment.” M: what happened here? “Siryu seems to have murdered the owner. Corporate dispute.” M: motive? “It does seem that siryu had voucher from aetherion corp so they could take over certain assets. One death voucher for aetherion.” (way to ensure smaller companies dont become part of the whole, let little wars break out to let the overall higher ups keep control) M: how long ago was she given the voucher? “Does not have date. She may have also killed another. One tech worker known by aetherion. Thrown into ocean. Body never recovered.” 26: what was their name? M: the ocean. Wow!
“Anongies. And one android Y493. M: how did the murder happen? “This one? Gunshot. Many. twice in back of head.” “He was facing towards back. 2 bullets missing from siryu.” “No footage. Siryu master hacker. Incompetence easy to fake.” 26: there seems to be no reason for this to have happened “Why here during murder?” 26: we believe siryu had a similar problem. When attempting to input the address of this location in a mapping software, it brought up the address of a dive bar known as the dredge. To arrive here, we had to input the address of dive bar. M: can we help with the investigation? Pleeease “Investigative rights. But speak of it no one. And accept that siryu may be murderer.” Looking around Office with a contract that just needs 2 signatures Ask xep to forgery Almado signs it, thumb print Could record entire videos here after for 2 whole days Personal computer, dont seem security related Various documents, various transactions most are above the board, some are not This is dual authenticated. Banking system hosted offworld, you can add copies cannot remove. Kinda like the blockchain Somehow, a few transactions are missing. Notes on the local computer are personal notes abt things hes agreed to sell. Removed, requires a master hacker or someone at all locations that was able to delete all of them at once in a coordinated effort
Would have to be within system, most likely Kiliv-vi or Voya Level of skill achievable by humanoid? Lvl 20 tho or a 0 day kind of hack (built into the system) Safe has been opened, police tape on it, uncloseable Taken everything from the safe as evidence (asper knows that siryu’s gun had a targeting system that would limit the kickback. Would still be hard to hack) Need 2 days to clear their gun with the courts Almado breaks into a room, aetherion corp property damage 2 computers, security guard booth Large screen that shows all the cameras in the area Missing footage exactly around the time of the murder Fantastic job At one point, able to see slightly not fully scrubbed. Able to see the outline of a copaxi man (sentient coral reef), walking away during one of the cuts. Enough that if it were being hacked really fast, wouldve been missed We download it rq Ripley grabs the cop He looks “copaxi. They live here, yes. Near ocean. But all is ocean.” Xep: around time of murder “Oh. anything else?” Al: someone tried to remove them Xep: we think. The level of soficistation has the level of hacks would make them galaxy known. Maybe that is not known. “Good hacker not known to galaxy, good hacker known to few.” Xep: this is approaching the limit of capability. It involved hacking into a banking system. And a gun. “Not good. Serious business.” Xep: someone at that level would “Push back the trial then. 2 years? (120 days)” “We’ll do request. Copaxi not enough to go on, plenty here.” 26: is the afact that they are missing from all footage except this one suspicious “Yes, but i cannot arrest ever copaxi that i see.” “Computer underwater do not work so good.” “Many live on shore to use computer, but some have vacuum tube.” Xep: if you had a lot, would it be a noticeable amount of vaccuum tubes. “Yes, but at that point, easier to live on land, no?” Xep: perhaps more comfortable underwater “Maybe,” Al: miku. I need you to tell that cop that it is very important for us to see the world like the victim did so you can get on that goddamn stage. I need you on that stage for 15 seconds. 1 picture. Holoshop can do the rest. M: do you mind if i stand on the stage to feel what the man felt before he died? “Of course” (internet was found not created. Credits are tiny computers. All planets had some form of credits of some density on them. Small cloud computing hardware, innately valuable) Puts a hologram of the dead guy The lividity seems fresh but the wound is old. Blood kept pumping despite him already being dead. Hey whats with this “We considered it a glitch with the system.” Almado phone call
Mr Maikeru Sukkoto is in another system Al: mr sakodol, things are going wrong. I recruited some interns. I got some decent photos, but the concert might not happen. I need insurance, stat. Going to Velu Shineleaf Hes an infomation broker, if you kill one your secrets will be leaked Hes simply here bc he likes the local liquor that is brewed here. He was a big shot in the aedryn but holds no love there Ayla doesnt follow us in N: do you want to come inside? “No.” Approach halfling man, sitting behind desk. Stops playing video game “Might i help you?” R: whatcha playing (first person shooter, but when he disconnects, everyone pauses) “Could i offer you anything? Cigar? Liquor?” M: i dont think i can have that “Of course, you want more cocaine, almado?” Al: yeah. “Im willing to work with you if youre going to work with me. What are you here for? The murder, or the stalkin’, nivaya?” N: not the stalking “Shes a real bitch, but she means well. Or is it about the ship?” N: the ship? “The unregistered one.” “How might i help yall?” As: we came at the advice of siryu “Lovely lady As: i believe so “Shame about the accusation, especially since it’s false As: i’m glad u believe that “At least 20% false, 60% true but I’m a dreamer As: i don’t think those numbers are true “Do you have numbers to back it up? As: no “Then 40 and 60 it’ll be E: Showing him the Copaxi “this might change your outlook “That is someone that is around the time of the murder. Few hours before the murder at the earliest. He appeared at a few meetings following that. Not the murderer, maybe an accomplace. Siryu knows a few. I might be able to find out who that is” A: what do you want in return? “I have some performers that went missing. I could do with finding them, hopefully today. You have a ship? A: we do, do you think we could find them within a day? “If you try ur hardest i think u could find it within urself to find them in a day Miku: we’ll try our best! “I have their last known location and what they look like. Is that sufficient? A: it should be “1 question if found, 2 if getting info should they perish, none if killed for 2nd question.” M: contact info? “Do not call me. Meet me in person. Info online is able to be stolen. Information real life, well, theyd have to beat you up in an alley.” Al: speaking of contact info, (to xep) whats your comm id? Xep: you dont want to be in my phone contacts when they find this. I will give you my number, but if you text me, if they find this phone, they’ll find yours. “Hopefully thisll clear up some of your questions, some of mine, we’ll keep this on the down low.” 26: we would find this agreeable “Even the one that worships that talkative bitch in the stars? As: do you mean me or someone else? “You’re the one that worships the goddess who cares about freedom of information right? As: I am still coming to terms with how I face the world. I do not know if I can agree to this arrangement. “Well, youll come back, see how you feel when you get the paycheck. There is no cash, only credit.” “You could take that ship, say i sent you, if you want to abandon siryu, you can. Ayla wont bother you. Her master wont be pleased if she interrupts something for me.” “Permanent breather from her if you leave nivaya and leave.” Go to spaceship One of workers looks, “im sorry this ship doesnt have a name. Do you know what it is?”
The Blue Angel
Oh Kalervo Turred is still here “I have good news! I dont know how i know it. You have been forgiven for your crime!” “The dreams?” Do you always have these dreams?? “No!” (he does seem to have bumped his hand, it didnt scab, but splintered, and then healed up.) “Its a good thing no?” Its good to be forgiven? “Forgiveness is good. Ill tell it to my dream. Is forgiveness paramount to vengeance?” As: why do you ask such questions? “Im trying to figure it out. Ive lived my entire life in that area.” M: miku believes that everyone deserves a 2nd chance Al: in a non-financial way. Wait i need that 2nd chance. Capitalism always gives 2nd chances
N: you mentioned that you were doing research on the ship for Zaera Allhaven, could you tell me more? “About evolution of course. Its all vague to me now. I remember back then we were doing research on evolution chains on how beings became sentient.” N: any progress? “I have. But of course she took it. It is her right.” N: on this ship? “No, ive been experiencing things, enjoying things. Ive recently discovered that there are ways to find companions in this world.” “Do you have trouble with a companion, nivaya?” N: so. More about your research. Do you have a family? “I was born there, i was adopted when i was quite young by m’lady.” “No one remembers much about their birth.” (26 remembers their birth, birthed from the brain) N: she told you to come here and experience things? “Yes” N: what did she say “To live my life a little, gave me a sum of credits, i did stuff, i learned many things, and i came back here because thats what im supposed to do.” N: are you to be with us? “If you’ll have me.” (drops something under nivayas sheets)
(its a book titled “Playing the Game - How to Drive Women Wild”) Al: did she give you a comm unit? “Of course.” Al: how many credits? “Not that many.” Al: ballpark? “30k? Xep: how many did you start with? “Before i met those nice ladies? 200k.” Al: never spend more than 1k in one sitting. Ok kid? “They charged me 10k per lady.” Al: youre still standing? “Of course, why wouldnt i be?” As: what did you learn there? “They gave me kisses, as adults do.” (we look at our bank Almado: Truth Miku: Missing Xep: Scene ASPER: Voyage 26: Oceans Nivaya: wont say Xep tries to hack in, it should be simpler but is an infinite void as theyre sucked across time and space. Back into reality. Similar to the circuitry Xep: the fuck is wrong with your phone? Ripley: Sacrifice) Flying, rainbow on the oceans below, prism-like effect Unique geometric shapes, starships that didnt survive landing that fell below Continue to myriad of jungles that make the greenery of planet, land Find signal flares where the last group left, even if their comms unit broke Takes a little bit Crash investigators wave and smile at us “why are you here?” Not cops, these are his men “Found the ship.” Al: heres the plan. Miku. (sets up a chair for her) 26: we were passed by velu shineleaf to find your location. “You found us. Can we go home? There is much to report.” 26: we heard there were 3 of you. “One fell into the ocean.” (they believe this to be the ocean, and not just a pond. It appears to have a bottom and salty bc of the land, but isnt the ocean.) Xep: what are you looking for when getting back to the city? “Booze and sex.” Xep: that bar you go to, whats the name?
“Sexico-6.” (theres no sexico 6 on the planet) (we know the guy whos been to the brothel. Nivaya texts him abt the name of it. He went to the starlace)
Al: have you been to The Starlace? “We like booze and women, like you.” (only ASPER can roll: they both seem to have what seems to be blood around the mouth slits of their breathing apparatus. Something crawled into their corpses and posessed their bodies. They want us to bring them back to civilization. One completely wiped it clean, one only partially.) Xep gets a sneaky pic “Why do you need photography?” Xep: waht are you guys “People who want to go home.” Xep: you are possessing corpses. I do need to know why before letting you on the ship “Circle of life. Had to do it.” Xep: are you some sort of creature that lives in others? “Yes.” Xep: did you kill them? “Not relevant. We found them.” Xep: how often do you need new corpses? “Often to propagate.” “Make if need.” Xep: that does have the connotation that it is something you enjoy doing “Do you enjoy killing? Do you enjoy fucking?” N: what did kill them? “Circumstance kill all. Search this area, unlucky, we in area first. Trap, kill. We lay. One fall into deep reach, cannot reach, cannot breathe salt.” Xep: did you make the trap? “Does not matter. They are dead.” Xep: what was the trap? “Trap was simple. Shot through head. Spike.” Xep: through the ship? Or they got out? “They not part of ship. Ship part of them. Too old to eat. Too old to take. Came here, ate trap, be thankful.” “Trap spectacular. Kill without blood. Soul ripped from body. Not from trap.” Xep: what did you do with it? “See soul escape body. They scream. Nothing we can do but take body. Only wish for more. Would it not bring comfort to see loved ones moving around as if alive?” “You would not care, ripley, to have a loved one
“No name is ripley. Necrophiliac ripley. Wish could fuck other. Bad situation. Monster to us.”
R: no i just miss him???? I dont want to see him animated like a weird thing??? (might be reading akashic record, cntrl+f grief)
Aedrynic Al: we’re not taking you back Points their guns at almado Combat:
Threllopex
Kassa-Raell

sessions/epitaph-protocol/session-4.html.title: Session 4
sessions/epitaph-protocol/session-4.html.description:
Prev: Session 3
Next: Session 5
Nsuoba Asper swims down to find the 3rd guy Couple things here, cables, alongside someone that wasnt killed by the creatures unless they somehow had lasers. They were killed by electrical burns, laser shot through her stomach that caused her to fall into the then electrified water Water makes it hard to see 1 credits box that is currently in tact, emergency fund for such ships Pull her and the box up Slap her onto the muddy shore, go get the money Woman seems to be very dead but not bloated, they died within a day or so More worms in the trees They were attempting to take the thruster to power the ship, succeeded briefly before one yanked out the power
Take the bodies over to the ship, dipping them in water first
Kalervo Turred seems to be listening to something on the radio Some sort of old timey music, almost entranced Gives short answers We’re outside of signal range for most radio waves Odd static to it We record a 5 minute video Their ship is across the beach Not a spaceship, motorized vessel for sailing the ocean, bobbing up and down in the water 15ft off the shore Fresh paint, entire thing is very unweathered They likely arent actually crash inspectors, actually local gang members who painted ship recently to go to islands off limit to the public Board the ship Sound of the bilgepumps churning away down below Oddly humble, the lot of them did drink on the way in, still fresh Ship has a few small components, took out the area where youd keep multiple people Only 3 would fit on this thing, able to carry their stuff Has 4 cryogenic cells in the back Well loved, but well maintained Ship has power, turns the radio on. Nothing but silence and static Tune it for faint sounds of radio station as the sounds of good morning jingle, nowhere near the old timey tunes from our ship No identifiable info outside of fake ids alongside department number that you should call should you arrest them No notable things, but changes of clothing left on the ship Bring the ship back to our own
Radio, DJ Hoth, seems to be gone Open up the credits box About 700 credits inside Box did have standard internal flare if someone unauthorized tried to open The things didnt speak languages, dug into the brain to figure out the languag If there are 2 of them, they figure out how to speak properly. Takes 8ish before it is able to speak Woman has been dead for about a day, probably less Xep hacks into their phones 1 has a how to connect generator to ship Other has diagram on how to disable ship defense systems Buried deep in phone, hasnt been opened since 4 days ago Back to the clearing The man that was supposed to disable it while the ship was off forgot to nivaya disables the turrets (5 of them) Power up the ship, 1 turret shoots at us Ship begins a little jingle
Advertising ship for The Serenade
Person its registered to is “Greying Twilight" Pseudonym, used by authors or spies Various flight logs, it crashed and then kept burning Water should be fresh water but it is salt Asper swims down again Fish is seen, size of a quarter crack that goes underneath the island Turn their radio on to old timey tunes Not the same model radio we have No belongings, not even candy wrappers Either ideal of a boyscout, or had no need for such thing Possible for ships to be autopiloted Lots of medpacks and propiarty software and schematics of the serenade Software is what velu wanted Red for the Serenade, yellow for others Asper copies down the software and schematics Back to the ship, hes still listening to the radio Turning on the ship turns off the radio Did u enjoy the music? “It was lovely.” N: where did you find it? “On the radio.” N: did you turn it on? “It turned on by itself.” N: what have you been up to? “I fell asleep a bit. I had some dreams” N: what did you dream about? “There were these women, right? Much like the house of hope i went to. But larger than me. And looking down upon me.” N: did they do anything? “They ran from me, in the fields, a rotund circular thing fell on me. With eyestalks.” Describes a poker chip (bug looking at people from the serenade crash?) Rest of the flight is uneventful Hear the cracking of one of the flay worms as it is turned into ice Dwarven man looks at us “Youre back. Sign here?” @ nivaya (see a dog in the yard hiding underneath another ship)
Go to Velu Shineleaf in Thorne He is waiting for us, just woken up, he typically goes to work at night “Now what i might do for you? Did you do what i needed?” N: we took care of it. There were some unexpected issues. “Bodies on the ship?”
“If they find bodies while youre on the ship, nivaya will go to his parents (Nivaya's Mom, Nivaya's Dad), xep will get executed, asper is connected to a murderer, and ripley cant pay for the bail.” “Dont worry, theyll be back there. And if i find anything from the info you got, youll be compensated handsomely.” Text kalervo to leave and join us for lunch Should i let the men on the ship? Theyre already in Yes that is fine “What do you need info on? The murder?” That would be agreeable “Standard rate for this info would be about 1000 credits” “Ill tell you what he was selling the murder victim. Ill give you 1 for free. Ill tell you how to find the base, idk where it is, they move frequently, and i can tell you where anyone might be assuming they are the murderers. Know you might want the evidence before you go in, and they arent the negotiating type.” Who is it?
“The man youre supposed to meet. The murder victim Arroyo Cemsor. Hes into some shady business. Im sure youre aware, but you dont know how deep it goes.” Hes angered someone?
“Last one went to Kiliv-VI, found some info, i oftered to buy it and he was murdered the day after. Idk what, or who, but he did find some juicy info and promised itd make me the richest person. The only request was that i didnt give it to the Concord of Aedryn but did it in accordance to the Aetherion Corporation.” (the murder victim may have been the one who burned the info in the egg)
“The man wanted to be a small info broker, but im not a man of many morals im a man of some morals, i believe that Hollow Stars is the way it should be. The systems decide what is right for the systems.” X: i dont have an opinion “You should come up with one, youve been alive for 3 days, my mama spanked me 3 days into my life and i did.” X: if we had info about what he was doing there is that anything “Based on what he was researching, i believe its part of the serenade/a piece.” X: where it is? “That would be worth it.” X: i will let you know he burned away some of the tracking info “Then hes a true professional” X: so you understand the value of the info youre buying before we transact. X: people who want to keep it under wraps killed him? “I doubt it. I believe the person who killed him wanted exclusive access to the info. If they wanted to keep it under wraps, this place wouldve been bombed” (data sticks taken from the safe) X: how do we find the base?
“Well. im glad you ask. Now there is this one group, the Hynarion Circle that has integrated itself with the base. It’s Elasalor Thara, shes working. She happens to have a dog, the dog wont go off planet. She wants nivaya. The dog wants nivaya. And i just say, let nivaya swallow a little smth smth to let out a signal, the dog wont be smart enough to know about it, follow said signal to where it goes.” X: what makes you think they are responsible?
“They have been dealing with a lot, theres a question how they found out. They worked closely, and then suddenly withdrew from the city entirely. Except Ayla who just got back. Shes a bitch, but shes a loyal.” Connections to her? “She would kill me if i told you about it. This is a deep question.”
X: someone swapped the location of his bar and his venue. What benefit would it have?
“To the murder? None. but itd make sure that Siryu would be in the right place, maybe they didnt change back.” X: frame siryu? “Idk why. Shes a wonderful smuggler. She was here to pick up 1 android floating in space.” X: she did not make the pickup. Do you know who i work for? “That is a deep question. They have an assassination robot. If they have 1, id go to venture they have 4 more that dont ask questions.” “My understanding, they are gone from the city but not from the planet. I assure you, they have the means to my end.” X: do you know how long i have til someone gets on my ass? “That is under siryu. Shes being questioned for the murders.” (xep killed 2 people)
X: what do you know about Zaera Allhaven? “Allhaven is a missnomer. She uh, my understanding is she likes to collect bodies, the people i send out like to retrieve bodies. She sometimes buys them. I believe in capitalism. I believe in the free trade market. They believe in everything they want. No one was doing anything with those bodies.” X: who else might be amenable to an android with 0 public exposure performing at their venue “I dont believe theres any place in this world for a performer who cannot sing.”
(he doesnt like miku’s song on ripleys fucked up phone and the local Infosphere doesnt have info on here)
“I know that persons (copaxi) sibling went missing on the serenade. Im afraid the Otad Gang may have gotten to them.” Otad Gang?
“Organization. Ill use your last one for this, i do believe they were behind the murder. My understanding is, they found one of the war ships from when aetherion and Solara Imperium took over the planet, they took it and turned into a floating roaming base of theirs. The guns do not work outside of the anti-air guns.” X: can we take ur mens boat? “Contractors, and if it survives, ill buy it off you for 300 credits.” As: need an expert “I could arrange this. How would you pay?” “Now happen to say, you infiltrate a very illusive to me gang and get back alive, that would serve as proper payment. If you happen, and no offense, you seem liek the type to get a finger trigger. If you take the boat, id be able to cover up said murder in attempt to cover up siryus maybe murder, i could take the boat and the information, and youd get off scott free.” X: anyone in particular you want off the boat? “Not really. I like ayla, but if she falls into the water, that’s fine.” “The man youre lookin to me, the copaxi, hes not part of the gang. But i believe he has a friend there. He lives in the city if youd like to talk to him first before you turn yourself in.” “Ayla is pretty amicable, despite words ive called her. Loyal, that one.” “Id cry (if she fell in), but id be find.” X: have we met before He wont answer The copaxis friend is a mechanic, in a warehouse “He does, however, have a few guns, tried to learn his siblings art, but he has failed. So now he grows plants works on various guns and automobile. The guns make the money. Should you help him, im sure hed upgrade any sort of gun youd ask him to.” He shakes all of our hands Nivaya talks to him alone N: how do you find someone who cannot be found? “I need a name, a place, a something.” N: someone from [insert college planet]. Thats all i have for now “Well then. Ill look into it for you. When i have an answer, youll have a price.” X: Nivaya what was the label on your bank transaction Rain on hardlight sounds like a giant breaking through a sheet metal barrier Nivaya avoiding the question X: ill shoot ripley in the knees N: whats the problem? X: do you need me to repeat the question N: my parents taught me not share bank details Xep shoots ripleys knee N: why do you need to know? X: youre ignoring the question to talk to ripley R: you didnt even tell me :( X: we are going on an operation that requires trust X: we wont ask you for what you just paid for, we are asking for that last word that we are missing R: i thought you trusted me, man N: i trust you more than them asper removes nivaya from the bond R, in lashunta: then tell me R: gimme a minute. Im not trying to hold this necessarily Xep starts counting down R: it is…. xep has done this before to someone. Looks up at the roofs, sees the rain falling in an odd pattern, someone is pointing a gun, ready in case we do anything too hasty. The person is invisible. The rain gives away their silhouette. R: maybe im a little too trusting, but i trust them. So like, be mad all you want, if its necessary, im telling them. I trust them. I trust ASPER, especially. N: will it suffice if ripley knows? As: how necessary is it? R: not as scary or necessary as mine. asper readds nivaya to the bond We go get lunch He has so many appetizers its really unnerving “Youre here! Just in time!” “Appetizers are not the meal.” X: have you ordered the meal? “No, ive been eating appetizers, its what you eat before lunch. I consider you friends. Can i make love to you? (goes in for a hug)” (close enough, welcome back phenomaman.) N: lets just have lunch??? X: the phrase make love is typically for reproductive phrases “You dont need to talk.” Menu is various seafoods, fish here are sleek and thin. Sliced open, laid upon grains of rice, then seared. No deep sea impurities He pays for lunch “My lady has procured me infinite funds.” N: did she send more money? “No, but if it goes negative then itll bounce back positive.” (allhaven may be leeching money from the serenade.) His portion comes out to 500 credits Write down some things he might want to see in a city if its your first day on earth. Enriching places to explore Head towards the copaxi's friend Fairly nice warehouse Lights inside are warm/floresence, also floral smell Creates for the first time, actual petrichor, despite constant rain Xep knows the smell of faint rot, 1 day old corpse and petrol 2 robots hovering around, immediately turn hostile Advanced weapons Xep almost cums from seeing such an easy kill (canon via zack bc neuron pathways were rewired) Nivaya gets shot and feels something come to him, but isnt sure what Ayla heals nivaya The copaxi is dead in the cage, shot by the drones Locked themself in here to avoid a grisly scene Cameras in here not looking in here or any movement, creating odd geometrical shape Some are following for all truth, something outside is telling them to ignore it. Will not exit unless given outside command at outside terminal or they are given sentience Cameras are proto humans almost, but ram is too short to allow actual breakthroughs in theology Copaxi given last rites, when they die they are given to the sea Ripley notices that this person, while desperate to find sibling, didnt do overt criminal acts. No power has monopoly, that everyone must relatively trade info freely, no power was stronger than the other. Because of that, they were killed. No allegiance By the same expert hacker, most info on the computer is gone Just the basics remain, enough to satisfy the police. Very impersonal, all of it. Still have wallet, various symbols, thing sibling sent of the serenade. In front of their id
Shalvex Aruun Postcard “Remember: youre my family when i win it big!” Carry the body through the sewers, let them go to the sea. Let them go for the last time ASPER Hears: “This will be my home” from silent voice, body twitching like a snake would Nivaya: “The geometry of my home is shifting, and has gone with my death.” Another being is staring at us, from before the water rapids, ayla stares down at nivaya “Arent you tired from running?” N: does now look like the time. “No, but i’m tired of waiting.” “Could you sleep and then come with me? Ill offer 1 last night of freedom. Meet me at your ship, and i’ll drive you back home.” N: alright, thank you. Sleep, the soft rain is pleasant for everyone but ripley Gentle tickle on the skin. Is nice. Reminds us that we’re here. Against all odds, we exist. Meet with ayla
Hands ripley a number for Camacho Family “They should answer you for this. But understand, i am doing what i need to do.” R: i understand, youre doing your job “Im doing it to ensure i have a place here.” R: i dont like it, but i understand “You two want a last moment. Ill close my eyes for the next 30 seconds, dont attack, my nose and ears are much better than my eyes.” Ripley hugs: dont go where i cant follow N: ill see you as soon as i can She opens up the car door for nivaya, long old fashioned car He gets in, she takes off. Rolls down her window, begins smoking Smoke mixes with the rain “I know what i means to have abusive parents, but yours are much better than mine.” N: should i go back? “Its the best way for all of us.” N: i disagree “I get rich, you get to go as a noble. If you want, you can follow my path.” N: your path? “I killed my parents. After they broke my leg.” N: ill keep that in mind “Of course. Maybe youll awaken one day. Be able to change yourself, as it were. Cigarette? N: yeah, ill take one “Do you think this is where life wouldve brought you?” N: i couldnt have predicted this at any time in my life. What about you? “I was born here. I never got to leave it. I was found on the beach by my parents.” N: anything before that? “I was young. Too young, and then they took me in. its kinda how it goes here.” N: i understand. “Just a beach-washed dog.” N: i think youre very strong. “And he did too. I was put to work.”
N: father? “Yeah, adoptive. Idk if you have blood relation, but im sure you consider them your parents” N: in a way “Youll make your way, and return.” N: making your way in the circle? “Ill be able to leave when youre turned in. i dreamed of the stars. I was able to change form, but i wasnt able to change where im from. I had to pay for what i did.” N: what you did with your parents? “I killed them, yes. They did break it, and it never healed. Its from when i first transformed.” N: im sorry it never healed in the way you wouldve hoped. “I had no hope, i had to learn anger. I killed on the first thing.” N: hope now? “I had hope back then, but i didnt know of the world back then” N: it can be cruel “It can be. Its where i learned cruelty.” Darker forest, the others are a few miles behind, guided by asper “I transformed and i learned cruelty.” N: i like you. If we ever cross paths again, just know, id like us to be friends. “We’ll see if we can be friends.” “I think we could, but we dont have enough in common. Youre a noble son, and im someone found on a beach. Im someone i wasnt, ive transformed, and youve only grown older. I dont think you understand what its like to lose what you used to be. Do you understand what it means to learn cruelty?” N: i understand better than you “I dont think you do.” N: we’ll have to see “When i was born, i was found on the beach. One of my forelegs. My father broke. I had to transform to learn cruelty. I grew to look like him. I was covered in his blood. I cant go back to how i was for more than a few minutes at a time.” (there is an easy question here: did she become a dog to kill her own dad?) N: were you a dog to kill your dad? “No, i had to learn cruelty. Dogs dont know it. I had to become like this.” N: i know… youve suffered a lot in your life. I know you struggle with the form youre in right now. I… just… want you to know that i think your ability to change, your ability to become who you want to become, is beautiful. “I dont have that ability. Im stuck like him, only a woman, but i have the advantage than my own ways. Elf ears are so much longer than dog ears.” N: ayla. I imagine im going to be cooped up for a long time after this. Could we exchange contact information? “Yes, but i imagine ill change my phone number soon after. I’ll be free.” N: new number? Its up to you Gives current number She fiddles with the radio, turning to old tunes. Not the same song as before

misc/gods/gods-of-the-aetherion-corporat.title: Aulgrith Narvaghel
misc/gods/gods-of-the-aetherion-corporat.description: God of Monsters, Mutation, and Evolution Without Mercy. Worshipped by biotech heretics and radical adaptives. “What survives is holy.”
misc/gods/gods-of-the-aetherion-corporat.sourcePath: Misc/Gods/Gods of the Aetherion Corporation/Aulgrith Narvaghel.md

misc/gods/gods-of-the-aetherion-corporat.title: Dravok Thuldros
misc/gods/gods-of-the-aetherion-corporat.description: God of Warriors and Strength. Patron of iron battalions that take to the sky protecting the vulnerable.
misc/gods/gods-of-the-aetherion-corporat.sourcePath: Misc/Gods/Gods of the Aetherion Corporation/Dravok Thuldros.md

misc/gods/gods-of-the-aetherion-corporat.title: Dulgrim Varnhollow
misc/gods/gods-of-the-aetherion-corporat.description: God of Death, Pyres, and Legacy. Keeps records of every fallen soul and the debts they carried with them to the grave. One must be sure to carry enough credits to pay their way to the desired afterlife.
misc/gods/gods-of-the-aetherion-corporat.sourcePath: Misc/Gods/Gods of the Aetherion Corporation/Dulgrim Varnhollow.md

misc/gods/gods-of-the-aetherion-corporat.title: Ezrith Vaerwyn
misc/gods/gods-of-the-aetherion-corporat.description: Goddess of Endings, Collapsing Stars, and the Yndra. One day it is said Khaldûr-Zin will be dust spread to the galactic winds.
misc/gods/gods-of-the-aetherion-corporat.sourcePath: Misc/Gods/Gods of the Aetherion Corporation/Ezrith Vaerwyn.md

misc/gods/gods-of-the-aetherion-corporat.title: Ghuldran
misc/gods/gods-of-the-aetherion-corporat.description: God of the Forge and Creation, creator of the dwarfs according to ancient tradition he came to the planet with a hammer and forged them from perfect stone and metal. The origin of worth its weight in Gold in the common tongue
misc/gods/gods-of-the-aetherion-corporat.sourcePath: Misc/Gods/Gods of the Aetherion Corporation/Ghuldran.md

misc/gods/gods-of-the-aetherion-corporat.title: Helna Varnthale
misc/gods/gods-of-the-aetherion-corporat.description: Goddess of Home and Defense, her symbols etched above airlock doors and emergency bunkers to ward off breach and despair.
misc/gods/gods-of-the-aetherion-corporat.sourcePath: Misc/Gods/Gods of the Aetherion Corporation/Helna Varnthale.md

misc/gods/gods-of-the-aetherion-corporat.title: Hurn Kaedhros
misc/gods/gods-of-the-aetherion-corporat.description: God of Fortresses, Barriers, and Unyielding Will. His temples never have doors, one must find another door to worship within the fortress.
misc/gods/gods-of-the-aetherion-corporat.sourcePath: Misc/Gods/Gods of the Aetherion Corporation/Hurn Kaedhros.md

misc/gods/gods-of-the-aetherion-corporat.title: Korgrimm Dunavar
misc/gods/gods-of-the-aetherion-corporat.description: God of Smiths and Laborers. Depicted with shackled wrists — by choice, not punishment.
misc/gods/gods-of-the-aetherion-corporat.sourcePath: Misc/Gods/Gods of the Aetherion Corporation/Korgrimm Dunavar.md

misc/gods/gods-of-the-aetherion-corporat.title: Maelgrin Thelvas
misc/gods/gods-of-the-aetherion-corporat.description: Goddess of Time and Forgotten Ages. Symbolized by an hourglass with falling stones.
misc/gods/gods-of-the-aetherion-corporat.sourcePath: Misc/Gods/Gods of the Aetherion Corporation/Maelgrin Thelvas.md

misc/gods/gods-of-the-aetherion-corporat.title: Nirda Faelgrith
misc/gods/gods-of-the-aetherion-corporat.description: Goddess of Life in Darkness. Worshipped in undergrowth caverns where Valthra Grinmorra’s light doesn’t reach and biodomes.
misc/gods/gods-of-the-aetherion-corporat.sourcePath: Misc/Gods/Gods of the Aetherion Corporation/Nirda Faelgrith.md

misc/gods/gods-of-the-aetherion-corporat.title: Nyzarra
misc/gods/gods-of-the-aetherion-corporat.description: Goddess of Despair, she gives power to her followers for increasing despair and darkness. Her followers now tend to cause extreme burnout of those under them.
misc/gods/gods-of-the-aetherion-corporat.sourcePath: Misc/Gods/Gods of the Aetherion Corporation/Nyzarra.md

misc/gods/gods-of-the-aetherion-corporat.title: Skavra Olyveth
misc/gods/gods-of-the-aetherion-corporat.description: Goddess of Mercenaries and Bannerless Hosts. Argued to be the truest warriors of Khaldûr-Zin, as their only true allegiance is credits.
misc/gods/gods-of-the-aetherion-corporat.sourcePath: Misc/Gods/Gods of the Aetherion Corporation/Skavra Olyveth.md

misc/gods/gods-of-the-aetherion-corporat.title: Tharaxa Silveneth
misc/gods/gods-of-the-aetherion-corporat.description: Goddess of Band Cycles, Reflection, and Duality. Revered by prophets and recluses who would dare live on the fractured surface.
misc/gods/gods-of-the-aetherion-corporat.sourcePath: Misc/Gods/Gods of the Aetherion Corporation/Tharaxa Silveneth.md

misc/gods/gods-of-the-aetherion-corporat.title: Thurak Azanruk
misc/gods/gods-of-the-aetherion-corporat.description: God of Miners and Credits. Their voice is heard when credits are dug from deep in Khaldûr-Zin, when people rearrange in the cred sticks some people can hear their voice.
misc/gods/gods-of-the-aetherion-corporat.sourcePath: Misc/Gods/Gods of the Aetherion Corporation/Thurak Azanruk.md

misc/gods/gods-of-the-aetherion-corporat.title: Thurnok Brispire
misc/gods/gods-of-the-aetherion-corporat.description: God of Debt and Chains of Credits, worshipped in the credit trackers and Auditors, worshipers tend to take some the interest of the loans they give out and offer it as tithes to the church.
misc/gods/gods-of-the-aetherion-corporat.sourcePath: Misc/Gods/Gods of the Aetherion Corporation/Thurnok Brispire.md

misc/gods/gods-of-the-aetherion-corporat.title: Tirn Malvenar
misc/gods/gods-of-the-aetherion-corporat.description: God of Portals, Transitions, and Remembrance Streams. Currently, Marked on Aetherion Stream Watchers.
misc/gods/gods-of-the-aetherion-corporat.sourcePath: Misc/Gods/Gods of the Aetherion Corporation/Tirn Malvenar.md

misc/gods/gods-of-the-aetherion-corporat.title: Valthra Grinmorra
misc/gods/gods-of-the-aetherion-corporat.description: Goddess of Liquid Light and Fire, she is the creator of the flow of life that flows through the planet providing light through the reaches of the Khaldûr-Zin
misc/gods/gods-of-the-aetherion-corporat.sourcePath: Misc/Gods/Gods of the Aetherion Corporation/Valthra Grinmorra.md

misc/gods/gods-of-the-aetherion-corporat.title: Velkura Dravareth
misc/gods/gods-of-the-aetherion-corporat.description: God of rot and ruin, worshipped as the rust that form in imperfect structure allowing new life to grow in the close quarters of Khaldûr-Zin and space ships.
misc/gods/gods-of-the-aetherion-corporat.sourcePath: Misc/Gods/Gods of the Aetherion Corporation/Velkura Dravareth.md

misc/gods/gods-of-the-aetherion-corporat.title: Velmae Thandoril
misc/gods/gods-of-the-aetherion-corporat.description: Goddess of Brewcraft and Alchemical Flora, patron of the pharmacies of the Aetherion Corporation.
misc/gods/gods-of-the-aetherion-corporat.sourcePath: Misc/Gods/Gods of the Aetherion Corporation/Velmae Thandoril.md

misc/gods/gods-of-the-aetherion-corporat.title: Vorthak Mornhal
misc/gods/gods-of-the-aetherion-corporat.description: God of Breach, Betrayal, and Necessary Treason. Invoked when oaths must be broken for greater survival.Symbol is a pickaxe through a credit chip
misc/gods/gods-of-the-aetherion-corporat.sourcePath: Misc/Gods/Gods of the Aetherion Corporation/Vorthak Mornhal.md

misc/gods/gods-of-the-aetherion-corporat.title: Zadra Nevrissel
misc/gods/gods-of-the-aetherion-corporat.description: Goddess of Magic. Depictions and worship change based on current cultural perception of magic. The 5th goddess of magic, currently worshipped by the Aetherion Corporation.
misc/gods/gods-of-the-aetherion-corporat.sourcePath: Misc/Gods/Gods of the Aetherion Corporation/Zadra Nevrissel.md

misc/groups/asphalt-mystics.html.title: Asphalt Mystics
misc/groups/asphalt-mystics.html.description: The magic of reading travelers who have driven over roads and through reading the collective movements of people they may divine truths over the universe. Colloquially known as pothole saints.

Slotsnax

places/khaldûr-zin.html.title: Khaldûr-Zin
places/khaldûr-zin.html.description: There is only two entrances and exits to Khaldûr-Zin, once those were claimed by Aetherion Corporation competition ceased to exist and all of the planet was diverted to a new goal, growth of this.due to the spinning rings above the planet that keep the surface at the roche limit there are only two ways in or out of the atmosphere, thus if you want access to outerspace you need to be an Aetherion Vessel once that was decided it only took 100 years to strangle the competition inside

sessions/epitaph-protocol/session-5.html.title: Session 5
sessions/epitaph-protocol/session-5.html.description:
Prev: Session 4
Next: Session 6
Thorne, Nsuoba Asper signs for the car we’re renting Truck, follow nivaya a few miles behind to destination
Ayla drives slowly bc its rainy Drives from sun rise to sun set Nivaya gets there first Hard to go over 30mph before hydroplaning Ayla rolls up windows “Stay” reaches her hand under the wheel, undoes wires for the battery Takes out keys and wires Walks into a baylike contraption, steel wall, no roof, hear sound of ship being slapped with waves Opens up one of the doors, walks on in Hear gun shots, goes silent again Nivaya looking around, then gunshot toward him. Car lurches forward a few feet, then turns off again Wires she disconnected went to the batteries, the car Shouldnt be moving Nivaya trying to get to the building, peeks in Slum city built into a wharf, neon lights still on, smell of food, some fresh some slightly burnt. No sound or movement, except for a ship rocked by waves Xep and co arrive Everyone jumps out of the car Fuck the car gets blown up These are not traditional soldiers, these are military software units to guard the road for military installation. They probably have maybe 3 more bullets let Scurry inside the building
Otad Base (Otad Gang) Ayla is inside writhing on the ground Combat Ayla was shot from the ship itself
Elasalor Thara breaths out and fires Druid using a sniper Navigational spellshape, allows them to use jetpack and increase reach of spell while casting at the same time Lashunta, body heavily frayed with blood replaced with blackened sludge Other one, shirren, has fused slightly with surroundings Things seem autonomous, have Some tactics despite being mindless. Having basic orders given to them Sniper fighting against something in its neck, fires Old timey Music
K'zamko - second sniper Can use Original is trying to resist something The thing in ayla is absorbing healing given to her, but would require a lot of surgery Nature as a shapechanger is helping her resist Xep jumps down in the ship, there are burnt out super computers, something was doing heavy computations so much so that the processors burnt out Main guns on the ship IM SO STRESSED OUT Xep blows up k’zamko and he smiles, holding out his arms. Eviscerates him Asper kills elasalor In the ship: Various people molded with circuitry, some use pistons as lungs. Hopefully unthinking Ayla is still transforming Xep finds a stasis pod for her See large geometric objects under the water Some thought, tho never reported on this planet, hollowed water planet Certain gas giants, signatures of geometric shapes at center = ppl living there, or lost civilizations. Shouldnt be latter bc of gravity + water This looks to be a normal gang prior, incredibly functional until a few days ago. Whatever happened, happened rapidly. Around the same time that they were killed Food still remains, moldy but low sign of decomp All of the computers are completely wiped, perfectly so 1 thing that cant be hacked, written down things
Asper is able to find 1 Cortan Hulack, appears to be almost a quartermaster for the gang, lack of guns except body Able to match pictures of him to one of the ppl shot, large veskian person
Ledger talks of income, including a statement of massive windfall from K'zamko, shirren psychic, was able to make lucrative money (wetwork), he get into contact w person offering job for assassination through psychic networks. Last bit mentions the amt of money was staggering, they were going to disperse it amongst the ppl as is tradition for the network Not quite credits, nanotech that looks like credits Fused to the nerve systems slowly took over their nervous system, started discarding part of the flesh that was irrelevant. Only 20 bodies found, 10 androids in the crew and none are present (never went after us androids) Inside has communications array set up, though, again, most has been removed
Pointed back toward aetherion space, at least through the sector, would also pass through aedryn space first (but edge) 2 options, 1: they have an insider in aetherion tech, 2: they are looking for aetherion research, using this as a way to ping aetherion signal This thing doubles as a signal jammer Able to see odd barrels filled with nanite gel, stasis gel meant for containing nanites or mechanic disassembly and transportation Used by aetherion special ops etc, used to cool down and contain stuff 5 empty ones Degrades when left in the rain, 2 days at this point it would go away The amount on the bodies is missing Ayla has a huge chunk of the gel in her There is none in elasalor Signal jammer turned off, 2 things happen when turned off immediately, almado is shocked Messages from manager, pictures of his cat “what? Call me” pictures of his cat again Al: can talk now, whats up? Miku almado thinking abt the music Not popular at all
Sounded very similar to the song of the original aetherion corp founder, Abrunda Aetherforge, when he brought his ppl to space. From his humble company came the corporation Not quite right, the notes are off and there are parts of it missing, song itself meant to have parts of silence. This is an accompanying piece to fill in the silence of the original song Play both at the same time, sparks come from the computers nearby. Doesnt destroy them, shuts down and restart including phones Only to things that the thing that did this touched. Aylas car wont do it, just keep churning We have miku + ripley recreate it The tech doesnt flicker We play the recordings again The tech still doesn’t flicker Go to the other side, miku sings to the constructs Nothing happens Almado combines the 2 songs and makes it his ringtone

sessions/oneshots/serenade-heist/session.title: Session 1
sessions/oneshots/serenade-heist/session.description:
Next: Session 2
A Envoy
Phoenix
Sarah Technomancer
Threllok-Zirshus
Vanx
Wanwan
The party has been hired to infiltrate The Serenade by a contact called Greying Twilight. He is an older gentleman who will be waiting for you when you arrive in the Slotsnax backroom. The goal is simple, held in the turret by the Big Pits quarters is a data drive that you only need to hit release on. The problem is if you want to do this and make it out alive you're going to need to disable security from getting to you, have a sample of the Big Pits' DNA, and set a bomb on the generators that will disable most automatic systems not on the backup grid.
Honny J is a thief with a lead on Big Pit’s DNA Main floor with his robot companion
Sentient slot machine Eac-A Kind of a roguish fellow, looks like he hasn’t showered in days Wears a letterman jacket with the letter Q We need to destroy at least 2 of 4 generators Can bribe chief of staff
He likes to spend time away from his guards at Sexico-6 Can destroy all the police vehicles Shunt them out the airlock Plainclothes operatives are all around the casino We go down to the docks and we hijack a ship to go check out the heat vents Seems like an air lock - they build up noxious gas and then launch it into the gas giant below Collection device below the rungs, collecting fumes from the gas giant and sucking them in We could go in but if we time it wrong it would vaporize us A skiff getting jammed in the air lock would stop the generator from working We’re going to be able to get into one generator through either the chief engineer or the chief of security First we find Honny J and Eac-a We find him out on the floor pretty easily We’re gonna go talk with the big rig cannon It fires into the gas giant whenever anyone gets a jackpot We really don’t have anything to trade with this guy for the info He uses the info as his ticket to gamble here forever We could theoretically act like we already have the dna and bluff hard enough that big pit comes to confront us when we need the DNA If he thinks we have it he’ll confront us, if he doesn’t believe it he won’t We manage to get a tour of one of the generator wings 1 person could run it but there are 15 people stationed The lightning tubes are super delicate, a single person could break them
Few odd mannerisms from Rank, tries to blend in with his workers, incredibly quick on the draw from his finger pistols, grew in village of humans (opposite of Karn), runs the auxiliary wings, Big Pit runs his own personal wing inside, personality “jives well with the men” (they hate his ass), leads to control rooms, panels, v clear he lacks knowledge about the technical stuff
Phlox tells detailed stories about “Mandalrhjeim” (AAAAAAAAAA- Kieran) He actually loves a wizard WanWan is trying to leave Going through databases rn, looking at security files and debugging settings Can let you disable security valves on actual generator, not actually renew, override next time they do this to take multiple hours Download maps of the area, can find routes getting past 2 of the bars stopping stealth drone (out of 5) Eac-a……………………

sessions/oneshots/serenade-heist/session.title: Session 2
sessions/oneshots/serenade-heist/session.description:
Prev: Session 1
Next: Session 3
The Serenade
RC drone with warning to Big Pits of “hey we took your dna” Takes about 2 hours for the first signs of a reaction North wing, contains the container yard we got a skiff from Security disappears among the container yards and can’t be directly followed for about 1.5 hours A few bits of frost sticking to their armor on return Probably takes a lot of power to keep things that cold? Where is that energy going in the container yard? Threllok We leave 1k credits for breaking an nda <3 Deep storage section 4, 5; container white Storage container has the sounds of a generator coming from 10 feet below Extremely short conex with stairs that go downwards and a computer that immediately asks for the password 1 minute timer A radiation drake beats us up and makes Threllok nauseated for the foreseeable future We find a lot of blood vials labeled as “BP 1-60” Looks like this is for the spell Clone We’re approached by an uplifted bear who has video of us in the cargo hold Bounty hunter who wants us to go loud so they can kill us and get a higher bounty If we do it sneakily enough they might not know We talk to our contractor We’re currently on big pit 45 No guarantee that is 1:1 with BP45 vial? We could challenge the bounty hunter in front of the turrets
We go to Sexico-6 and have a groupon to get in We pay 1000 credits to see the giantesses of sexico 6 We negotiate with the giantess who doesn’t want to give up her most loyal client We lie that we just want to keep her and her loyal guy out of trouble “We aren’t the ones causing the problems, we’re just aware and want to make a profit” She brings out a dwarven man in a bathrobe

sessions/oneshots/serenade-heist/session.title: Session 3
sessions/oneshots/serenade-heist/session.description:
Prev: Session 2 Jamming a skiff in one generator, overriding another? Using the chief of security to make sure no guards go to our destination We smear some dna on the thingy and then we head in
The Serenade Discussing with the dwarven security officer Blackmail him with a deepfaked video of him sucking toes We’re knocking him out, doing surgery to take control of his microchip (to direct guards away,) and stick him in a cargo container to avoid him being found Our driving is incredible <3 we bypass a whole Situation <3 We got that chip and leave him in a cargo container We have around 3 days before it gets suspicious but thankfully we do not need 3 days <3 We go to the server room. Is full of ghost. Wanwan plays multiplanar subway surfers on the monitors and hacks in a little corner 5 min delay Vanx is set up to fuck shit up! Yaay Flying skiffs into systems <3 There is a critical error In 5 minutes the power will go out and our way out of this area is an elevator We did it 🎉 We have sabotaged the generators We send out the orders to the guards but don’t have the receiver so can’t tell their reactions The orders were successful, no guards just turrets without enough energy to shoot We sneak into the elevator and use the 45th’s blood It tells us “welcome back handsome” 10 minute elevator ride Clearly created to admire the rest of the casino
Elevator intercom comes on and Big Pits is suspicious of us We do a little lie but it’s quite bad He wants to send us down so we’re going for it

misc/media/games/league-of-leisure.html.title: League of Leisure
misc/media/games/league-of-leisure.html.description:
League of leisure is a moba competitive farming simulation game. Two teams of 5 players compete on a shared map to out-farm the other team by territory control and economic gain.
reach the economic gain threshold before the enemy team
TRIGGER AN ECONOMIC COLLAPSE IN THE ENEMY TEAM (DESTROY THEIR MARKET HUB) Cultivator: high-hp, zone denial units
Harvester: low-hp, accelerates food production
Merchant: low-hp, increases economic gain
Raider: mid-hp, roamer that disrupts enemy infrastructure and collects OR STEALS resources
Apothecary: mid-hp, healer for units & farm plots

misc/miunctios.html.title: Miunctios
misc/miunctios.html.description: A cult belief in the ascension of the mind through micro digitization, the most popular form of practice involves using credits' ability to mimic organic life to replace cells in the body turning the person inorganic overtime, though a fully completed version has yet to be documented. In most forms of Miunctios the body is left behind after the attempted process and the now digitized soul/mind would be free to wander the virtual paradise. There are internal conflicts in the religion of the holiness of androids/souled AIs, as some view them as divine messengers and others as traitors who have returned to the world of the physical after a successful ascension.

pcs-(active)/haven.html.title: Haven
pcs-(active)/haven.html.description:
Ithax
Senaria Suns, League of Leisure
Suimin, DenpakantSPOILERS
Who are you now, only weeks after The Scarring? Haven, he/him, kasatha envoy, 26y/o Why are you the class you are? What made you choose this path over another? He has a very demanding personality, and he specializes in making others do what he wants. What do you specialize in: combat, survival, influence, craft, mysticism, technology, or something else? Influence + combat Where is your Scar? Back of the neck up the back of the head. Peaks up just behind his mask. What are your personal edicts and anathemas? Describe a situation during or after The Scarring that did/could test or shatter them. Edicts Outshine your rivals. Use every resource you have to win. When the plan is falling apart, know when to cut your losses. Anathemas Breaking a sworn vow or contract. Resisting change or refusing to adapt to new circumstances. Allow personal feelings to cloud judgment. Before the shattering, he was consistently tested on his anger management skills, but he never did anything drastic that cost his team the mission. Yet. Then again, he’s actually got people he cares about now that have an even higher chance at getting killed. What is your immediate goal now that the initial killings are over? What do you most want to protect, change, or destroy in the city? Survival is the biggest thing; making sure that Ithax doesn’t get in over his head with his investigations. He wants to shut down a lot of the criminal orgs here, making sure that others weren’t dragged in like he was. How did you survive The Scarring: was it through your own hand, someone else taking the fall for you, a deal you struck, or something stranger? He struck a deal with an old acquaintance, Meskiv. She needed help getting an ex-client out of the picture, and he needed to live. He didn't even ask for their name, just knew they were some barathu. But they surely weren’t important enough if their bodyguard left as soon as things got tough. They just cried out when they got cornered. At least it was quick. How did you gain your class abilities: formal training, gang work, religious order, guild apprenticeship, military service, experimentation, accident, or natural talent? Initially gang work, but acting as a shot caller has been nice for upkeep on skills. Who were you before The Scarring began? A pro esports player, technically, but tried to hide previous involvement with criminal orgs. It’s not hard to tell what he used to do, though. When he did an occasional stream, it became a popular joke amongst his chat on what he used to do: hired thug, drug trafficking, assassination work, all were thrown out as suggestions.
He grew up in Denpakant with the name Vihe (v-eye-hey) Nanse Jaltra of Clan Runsa with his dad (Nel Samsal Teadri of Clan Runsa), but once he was old enough to start earning some credits for simple work, his dad needed more and more money for his growing gambling addiction. After shit hit the fan one too many times, Haven left their apartment at around 15 for a grimey, tiny one rented to him dirt cheap as long as he acted as errand boy for his landlord, Luthien. Turns out, he’d unknowingly joined a gang. Were you connected to any gangs, guilds, noble houses, religious orders, militias, or other organizations before all this?
A local off-shoot of a gang that called themselves the Storm. He always thought it was a stupid and cliche name, but they seemed proud of themselves, and he didn’t really want to get his ass beat. What did you do for them? It started off small; make deliveries, debt collect, don’t die. Then as leadership slowly left or got axed, his roles got more important (mostly killing people who pissed off the upper guys), until he had a small squad of guys who listened to what he had to say. And as their influence grew, that meant more people died under his watch, even some of the new guys that he said he’d take care of. Being stuck in there for just about a decade, he had his fill and decided he’d had enough. So, he cut his losses (not without some yelling and a few new bullet scars in his right arms), moved across town, changed his name, and didn’t really touch the scene until Ithax started poking his head into things. He’s lucky he’s got someone like Haven there to keep an eye on him. What is your strongest memory from before The Scarring? Has it changed in meaning since then? The first time something made him falter in his actions. He was barely 17, still a nobody, but trust was put in him to get Luthien’s money from a “tenant” that was refusing to pay. It was a vesk woman and her teenage son, just a few years younger than him at the time. He shook her, and the boy ran at him, yelling. Panic made him shoot, and the next thing he knew was the boy writhing in pain, clutching his leg. They didn’t have the money to get help, and they all knew it. He threw up in the alley outside their apartment. If the curse had never happened, what would you be doing right now? Streaming, or if he got bored, leaving the planet to find something new to do. There’s only so much you can do in one city for your entire life, especially when you’re trying to avoid the consequences of your actions. Where in the city were you born or raised or are you from offworld? He was born and raised in the southwestern district [INSERT DISTRICT NAME HERE]; it’s where his family lived for most of their lives, and he hadn’t moved far from home initially. But after he left, he researched and booked it to Denpakant (raised in district where it then nuclear meltdown. Hard 2 get to) Who were you closest to before The Scarring? Ithax, Meskiv Who do you still have left? From his understanding, his dad is still around, though it’s a bit surprising. He’d texted him, something he did often asking for money or trying to check in with him, but all it said was “Don’t come home.” What were some life changing memories before The Scarring? The first few days after leaving home. He still hadn’t found a place to stay yet, and he hadn’t thought things through that much at his age. He ran out of food super quick, so he turned to asking people politely, and when that failed, he stole. It didn’t take Luthien long to find a kid willing to do anything for a place to stay. Describe a moment from The Scarring’s first weeks that permanently changed you. Ever since he’d moved away from Storm, he’d found peace in the anonymity of a new home and faces. But that peace shattered when someone followed him home and tried to stab him in the stairwell. He’d seen the fear on their face when he pulled a pistol out and shot with precision. His life or theirs, and he won. Guess he still had the reflexes, despite trying to avoid that kind of life. Name three NPCs you know personally who also survived The Scarring. Are they allies, rivals, or something in between?
Meskiv Ocano - ysoki, she/her, behavioral scientist with a focus on criminology. She was, ironically, a major client of Storm’s. Two of her brothers were in the group, and when Haven came and made sure they didn’t die for being stupid, she was a bit soft on him. She kept in contact after he left, and though he’s pretty sure she has alternative reasons for doing so, he does appreciate a little bit of care being sent his way.
Luthien - human, he/they, 35y/o, asshole landlord that pressured Haven into joining up with Storm. Trained him in the loosest way one could interpret the word, but always bragged about the fact that Haven very rarely got his ass beat by those outside the group. Kind of his father figure (since he somewhat raised him) if his dad sucked even more and threatened him constantly.
Imrek Sariin - kasatha, he/him. Was also part of Storm, but joined after Haven. He looked up to Haven a lot, though didn’t really listen to him when he was told that he could have a better life elsewhere. Where one stayed, the other left, but Imrek has reached out to him and warned him about things that could involve him in the past. Of those three, who would you kill to save yourself? Who would you die before harming? Kill to save himself - Luthien, Imrek? Die before harming - Meskiv Do you have any history with the other PCs: family, rival, ally, co-worker, neighbor, debtor/creditor, or something else?
Ithax - Roommates and teammate. Haven tagged along on his investigations to provide back-up in case anything happened, and also to make sure that things went Ithax’s way.
Konbini-chan - Guest player on the team, know her personal identity? What themes or arcs are you hoping to explore with this character in the aftermath of The Scarring? (i’m so bad at deciding these sorts of things) People can surprise you even if you think you know who they are To what lengths can someone change who they are? How long does it take after fucking people over can you say that you’ve become a good person? What kind of gameplay experience do you want mechanically? (e.g. social manipulator, heavy hitter, problem solver, specialist) Problem solver, social manipulator. Lot of commanding my allies and spooking my enemies What kind of end do you imagine for your character: survival, sacrifice, power, transformation, or something else? I kind of actually picture sacrifice for him? How would you prefer the city’s political and faction details be delivered: in-game through NPCs, as handouts, or through GM recaps? Via NPCs or handouts, tho I prefer NPCs What are you hoping to see in this campaign? (Tone, themes, types of encounters or problems) Pushing the PCs to their limits of what they have to do in order to survive. What content or themes do you want avoided? Explicit pet death This campaign will explore coercion, control, scarcity, death, and power struggles. Are there specific emotional beats (e.g. betrayal, body horror, loss of autonomy, desperation) you want excluded? Just avoid explicitly talking abt damage to eyes pretty please! Some elements will include urban horror (claustrophobia, paranoia, constant surveillance). Is there a particular way you’d like these approached? Nope, I’m good!
aliases: Vihe Nanse Jaltra of Clan Runsa

places/systems/auver-system/senaria/denp.title: Denpakant
places/systems/auver-system/senaria/denp.description: The temperature is always a flux between fall and spring depending on the time of year. It's a relatively poor district destroyed in the last large galactic war and never fully repaired due to damages to its space port which were deemed too costly. Though there is a some luxury buildings that remain, you live in the megabuilding Suimin all on the same floor of the same wing in the same hall on the 37th floor. Suimin

places/systems/auver-system/auver-system.title: Auver System
places/systems/auver-system/auver-system.description:
Concord of Aedryn spacehas mega cities with great earth-like habitatsAuver System which is a border system with of 5 empires that connect to it currently under the Concord of Aedryn. Your planet is the 6th one from the sun and tidally locked, Senaria. The habitable zone is thus in the constant twilight belt, with the part that faces the sun reaching up to 400 Fahrenheit, while the permanent nightside has temperatures of around -200 Fahrenheit.The megacity is primarily built in the form of a giant line that circles the planet in the twilight zone. Commonly subdivided into 32 zones following the compass. Officially referred to by their magnetic designator, but commonly referred to common names by the populace.Your district is the in the northwest known as Denpakant.
Senaria

sessions/epitaph-protocol/session-6.html.title: Session 6
sessions/epitaph-protocol/session-6.html.description:
Prev: Session 5
Next: Session 7
Nsuoba Oh no we have new words in our bank accounts Duplicates - miku Home - almado Innovations -26 Stagnation - xep Amnesia - asper Missing - ripley Cattle - nivaya Xep tries to hack into nivaya’s bank again Doesnt get it These wouldve came before the signal jammer went down, local file and data file match The original words wouldve been when we found the crashed ship No malware was found On miku’s, only approved numbers can be added, definitely monitored (why are we all able to be added onto miku’s phone?)
Almado basically has ransomware to use his phone via Aetherion Corporation
Taking the boat back to Thorne Slowly but surely make our way back down range, slow goings We all throw up except ripley Met by coast guards, intercept us and board “We’ll be taking this from here. You take one of the smaller vessel” Not actual coast guard, wouldve made their tradeoff/bribe more inconspicuous We take a few things off, “youre keeping a survivor?” X: shes a comrade of ours M: a friend! X: who was infected “Infected?” X: oh yeah be careful Pilot us back onto actual shore, remove holograms to reveal vessel is just a fishing vessel
Left in a warehouse by the sea with ayla’s ‘coffin’ Put her in a con-x
Go to Velu Shineleaf, more than delighted to see us Has various cups in front “drink of choice, anything you want?” Almado gets a Dr Vesk + whiskey “Aunt Jermima” /j Carbonated ‘beef’ broth Nivaya gets an ale “No i dont rightfully know what youve been through, but you all have been worse for wear. You wouldnt mind talking about it over drink?” X: we’d like to exchange it for goods and services “Smart learner! Probably the smartest in your group, no offense 26” 26: we are called the 26 laws of power “Of course.” X: a mutual acquaintance was heavily injured in a- we had to put her in a stasis pod bc we dont have the ability to cure her injury “Injured by what” X: thats what we wanted to talk about “Cryogenic pods on a backup battery. Best talk quick.” X: as last time youre amenable to freebies “Of course, bonus but not freebies” “Im no miracle worker, i have no clericism or mysticism in my bones.” “Theres some issues, i cant cure waht i dont know, and my men didnt know what they were looking at.”
X: the Otad Gang completed an assassination and were paid a large sum of credits that they split amongst themselves, these werent legit credits, they were… biologic agents? They take over the hosts body and fill their veins with oil. Cause them to act as some kind of hive mind collective that wishes to attack and propagate itself. They explode. The entire Otad Base was wiped out by the activations. The first thing when ayla and nivaya entered, inserted a large number of credit material into her and left her out to lure us in. any healing we apply goes to the parasite machine and not her. N: it didn’t look like it was placed, more like the creature crawled into her itself As: similar to what happened to nivaya. Creatures tried to attack u “Are u infected Nivaya?. N: No “That is a pickle indeed. Magical in nature or technological in nature? Mix of both? Mix of both AS: it did absorb the magic i tried to put inside of Ayla “Do u know how big it is or how it transfers itself AS: goes from host to host. By injury if not touch “If it’s host to host then u fought babies Al: tried to attack the downed people “Could’ve just been credits, stuff can happen to them Based on Otad log, it’s about 4-5 hours after credits were distributed for things to happen Theres a larger time frame bc it wouldve been the time ppl went to sleep “That is a large time frame, unfortunately these sorts of things are not unheard of. But. i’ll look into it. Anything else?” As: didnt affect androids “I understand if the creature was expanding, they would’ve been put into the ocean. Androids may be made of nanite and steel, they arent heartless, but this thing might be.” X: druid did attempt to resist, but did ask to get mercy killed “Losin’ battle.” X: ayla wasnt immediately taken over “Quite a lot, i imagine i could offer 1500 and that car that went missing under aspers name.” “Are you plannin to seek after this thing or go your own way?” Al: i’ve got some interest in it “If it was the baby, where’s the mother?” “We could try to find- they likely arent planet, and they likely sent a signal. You could track down anything sent through the remembrance gates. Anything valuable wouldve been searched. We’ll just follow and see where it goes, and i’ll follow it along. In return, your ship is missing a remembrance engine, it flew normally. I could retrofit it if you have time to spare.” “The murder is quite simple, in return for this, i wont prove her innocence, but they wont have evidence. I can make sure shes free to go for the next few years, they could do a warrant if they want her.” (basically free for 3 earth years) “I have 2 requests. 1 is that you use me as the primary information broker. I’ll leverage all the local ones when you get there and i get there. Ill be lagging behind a week or so, initially.” As: the 2nd? “Don’t fuck this shit up for me, okay? If you fuck it up, i’ll make sure your ship suffers a nasty explosion during take off at some point” Al: if we continue to succeed, we’ll come back to negotiations “I plan to negotiate every step of the way. Every step of the way, i’ll be there. I’ll make sure that no one learns anything.” Al: familiar with standard aetherion contact protocols? “Ill fill out all the proper paperwork. A few charitable donations to your organization. Youll file those away properly legallike?” X: working in an official capacity? “Youre not working for me, we’re working together. I’m an independent actor. There is… i’ll get back to you with info as time goes on, dont you worry. Ill need a few days to figure out what exactly we’re tracking here.” His plan is to follow the nanite paste thatd have to be marked between transist. Downtime - 4 days Xep is making malware to change ring tones to miku
Miku + almado stage @ The Mirralight Good Apple and Get ‘Em! Miku gets 200 followers
In aetherion white and blue, Kaito (X4170)????
