As: like cultivation package? “No to become a pseudo-vocaloid As: i do not believe i would be suited for that “It’s important to know how to experience emotions before they overwhelm one. It’s also believed that vocaloids are unable to experience the passing on of souls. I’m 30 and haven’t experienced any calling As: you don’t wish to pass the body to another? M: we’re supposed to be ehre for the fans forever “Do you want our promise to be meaningless asper? As: i don’t mind either way. No emotions towards it “If you don’t care then why do you feel shock? As: Renewal is natural no? “Many things are natural. But many aren’t. We’re on a giant asteroid at a grill As: fair. It’s just weird cause this body has experienced many renewals “You’ve experienced no renewals. Last one u became asper and that’s all u know As: true, tho i’ve heard stories of those before me M: meiko if we don’t do renewal how do our souls pass on to other bodies? “Don’t worry miku you’ll be fine M: ok. Yay <3 Vesk waiter comes around taking orders Meiko moves to the bigger table Almado is not allowed to join “How did you let the first miku that you knew come to pass?” As: huh? “According to miku, this is the 2nd miku, which would make this the third. So i ask, how did miku 2 come to pass.” (try to explain it) “Are you the 26 laws of power by chance?” 26: yes!
“When i was last at MUSE Plaza, i met another contemplative that talked highly of you. Zebufera's Last Doctrine. They talked abt ur potential, they want to see u risen to it in the future.” 26: we are very grateful for their kind words. Theyre truly kind. Truly magnanimous and wonderful person. “Apparently you had a malfunction in the last competition with them” 26: we were not in the proper headspace and were struggling to maintain our focus. It was not ideal but we will hope and endeavor to do better should we encounter them “They wish to meet you again to check on ur progress.” 26: perhaps- we would appreciate that.
“My understanding is theyre in aedryn receiving accommodations from the aedryn president if you want to meet with them.” 26: we’d expect nothing less from them. Perhaps we will wait until we have more news to share, it would not be worth it at this point
“ZLD recently started working with us. After all they won the tournament to work with the head of R&D. Who, as u know, is overall in charge of Muse M: almado didnt tell us Almado gets smacked by a pahtra meiko “Theyve been working with us, yes. But there is a question, and i do believe in democracy. Does almado deserve to live? Only those at the table.” M: miku thinks he deserves a 2nd chance Meiko writes a PIP that suggests demotion X: could u tell him that being nice to miku would be good for his career advancement. If thats how that works She approaches almado, hand on back of head, moves mouth down to shoe “Kiss it, and thank me.”
“Be nice to miku. Or else the career might be over. Do you know that theyre trying to open a new Remembrance Streams? Lots of labor will be needed soon. You seem a strong lad.” Al: i wont let miku down “Thats all i ask.” She approaches the other 3, bows, they bow back Ripley goes and tries to get her autograph One meiko bodyguard holds up a hand, he walks off to the side, pats down ripleys tome to see if theres a bomb He hands it to her so she can sign, she does, then leaves Waitstaff slowly emerge after being so so scared Veskian man approaches “is there anything else you want?” Al: m-m-moist towelette (hes covered in soda) Miku thinks meiko is so cool Higher ups love meiko, they dont like kaito, and the public really likes CV03 (luka) X: Almado anything else u want off ur chest Al: theres a bomb in your heart- (TAZED) Al: if i fail, its so that no one can get her tech. Bomb to destroy her. Idk the trigger. Im not even supposed to know about it R: how do you know? Al: they told me, if your heart stops, there’s been a few close calls already. Z: and u didnt think to tell us this???? Al: sorry, sorry, sorry Miku texts meiko Hey girl. There might be a bomb in me now Asper talks abt wanting to go to aedryn Zmena has contacts there And 26 does Korr suggests doing minor cosmetics on us all (specifically the retinas)
“Ur ship was registering as a different ship at every port. UNLESS HE DIDNT MENTION IT. (pointedly at Voz Ricander)” Personal fighter jet is following us, fans of miku? “I’m a big fan, and paparazzi, i wish to follow you.” M: omg a fan!
Someone named Dakine Xep knows its elven for Jane Doe Ragash is orcish word for John Doe Miku doesnt understand that ppl will obscure their names for trickery and not transgender reasons as: korr is this the companion u mentioned? “Which companion?” 26: korr is this the companion u mentioned bringing back to asper? “This is the group meant to take down a corp just a week ago?” drinks from her flask
Z: Arkari is where my family is from, we moved to ksate when i was a child. There may be answers for me there, im not sure Z: idk if my brother is there. Maybe my parents? I just have no leads Going to Arkari

sessions/epitaph-protocol/session-17.htm.title: Session 17
sessions/epitaph-protocol/session-17.htm.description:
Prev: Session 16
Next: Session 18 26: mmm we have a question. We know ur parents are on this planet? Z: no theyre not probably
Going to Arkari
Googling his hometown Auchenda Doesnt have a whole lot going on in it, almost a vermont esque ocean town. Small, idyllic, population rough 20k (small by sf2e standards) About 25 years ago (3 years before zmena’s birth) an astrazoan turned into someone’s sibling and killed them Shapechanging is illegal and counts as falsifying identity (felony) Shapechangers get pinned for recent murders if there’s no evidence Its a crime, same way that crossing boarder illegally is a crime Too small to scan for dna Low crime, some smuggling
Do get most of their funding from Ficastor Corporation, which is based in Acoria Z: im from this town, i havent been since i was a little thing, ill admit idk what to do, i dont have leads with finding him. I remember being here but idk much else. We left in a rush R: remember where you lived? X: know if u owned or rented the house? Is it a house Was a house attached to a bookstore
Take us roughly half a day on The Blue Angel Almado is weird friendly toward miku, giving her 4 hot chocolates? Not very good. Swiss miss, distilled water, plum juice, handful of whatever candy in stock Asper going to cargo hold “Thank you for keeping our ship in motion and preventing us from having to refuel. If you spend the time with me I would like to connect with you” Does not work Reason to not do it on a planet: The ship upon reentry has shields that go up that protect the parts that are exposed in 0G
Asper, Almado, and 26 decide to go on the spacewalk. Bubbles is coming with us cause Orbians are always flying and immune to the void of space Almado leads to the underside of the ship Able to do a spacewalk Asper is trying to speak towards the fuel area credicites Trying to do the jingle Small jitter over the public broadcast signals As: Hello, thank you for keeping our ship in motion. I know this is unconventional and we did not have the best initial meeting but I would like to have more concrete discussions than the past if you would spend this time with me. Convo seems one-sided but we do connect to Something inside. Adding it to the network We head back inside As: We have made contact. There has been no direct communication yet but I will... in network “Hello. Are you able to speak in here?” Its faint, but on xeps receiver and especially aspers, the transceiver will light up once. And then creature will have the “silenced” condition. Will remain this way for a few days. (1 blink is often code for yes)
Almado going to Voz Ricander Al: do u want ur property back! “When i land the ship” Almado gives him hypervigilance Al: ill put the rest over there! “Will asper be able to put it in?”
As: yeah. Why not dr Halrex Korr? “Shes a bad doctor for me.” As: why? “I believe she will kill me.” As: oh. Is this a feeling? “I cant say why. She will be a good doctor for you.” Land at night We rest outside the city Zmena turns into his older shirren form Zmena doesnt want us to mention his brother or our connection. Is Gymic in this form
Paparazzi Dakine lands in front of us “wahts this leg of the tour then?” Al: we’re broadening mikus horizons so she can connect with more people “Are you saying miku is connecting with the simple people?” Al: miku is connecting with everyone! Isnt that right miku? M: miku does want to connect with everyone! As: it is good to make connections like this She taps on her vest, begins recording M: can i vlog! Al: of course! She taps on the other side of her vest, causes the signal to go out around her “You had half a day to prepare and this is the best you could come up with an excuse?” “I need you, the 2nd a camera is involved, to not panic, otherwise it looks bad for all of us on camera. The worst you can do in spycraft and as an idol is panic.” She turns the signal jammer back on, she offers us rides on her motorcycle, 2 a ride
Kalervo Turred wants to ride with 26 26 and turred He will partway thru the drive “you know about time anomaly, right?” 26: somewhat
“Are you familiar with the movie hedgehog day?” 26: we have seen hedgehog day “I think im in a timeloop” 26: ? “I can feel it, and i think im getting a sense of deja vu” 26: ? “I think im on the day 0 of the timeloop.” 26: mmm. “Should i test it?” 26: no. we do have a question, what would u be experiencing deja vu about if this is ur day 0? “The future!” 26: is it not similarities to the past “I thought it was similarities of lived experiences” 26: yes “What if my past is in the future?” 26: u wouldve still experienced it “Ive experienced going down these roads before.” (he truly believes it. This is the first time hes been to a 2nd planet within the same system and saw the same street signs) 26: on planets within the same system, they have the same street signs. Therefore, this is ur first time visiting a neighboring planet within the same system. Perhaps thats the source “Maybe i should just rob a store to be safe” 26: we think that would be a bad idea, we would not want to bail u out of jail “Do u think if i was in a timeloop, its a different me or a different world” “Maybe my consciousness gets beamed between worlds.” 26: turred. That is not the case. U are describing witchwarping, which is what we do “Im a witchwarper?” 26: let us wait and see on this matter. Perhaps we can discuss this later He tries to create his own quantum field for the rest of the ride Asper xep Rip zmena Z: Ty for the help “Where do you want me to drop you off?” Z: just in the city. Near the local shops “City square?” Z: yes, that works Miku and almado Miku being cool in the sidecar Zmena leads us to the bookstore, small, only one open in town Books themselves are a bit.. Antiquated Bookstore is coastal facing, with slap of waves coasting against it Zm walks in, hears an unfamiliar voice “Just a second!” woman says She goes down the stairs, looks Z: hello “Hello! You’re back.” Z: yes its been quite a while Woman is unfamiliar, but she goes for a hug Shes the daughter? Of the old owner (who died about 5 years ago)
Her name is Tharn “Im sure her spirit will be happy that you came back. She was a bit worried you got kidnapped again.” Z: nothing like that. I shouldnt have left without saying goodbye, i didnt mean to worry her “People go their own ways.” She offers to take us out for food and then too the cemetery “I did accidentally steal ur inheritance.” “Youre like a child to her, she did provide you with some. It was small, but still a sum.” She does flip the sign over, locks up the store. Prepares her little van for us Z: i missed this old bookstore “Its lovely. As much ur childhood as mine.” Z: been quite a while “How did you all meet? And where were u these last few years?” Z: i went to college, we all met while travelling, tho i met ripley in college “Oh! Now that ur… and youve been studying? This entire time?” Z: yes! Ive been trying to make a place for myself, education, learn more “So youre going to become a professor in your old age.” “If you were able to attend college, maybe u didnt need the inheritance. Let me give u smth, it would be awful to hold onto it.” Z: it would be nice “Whatever books you want from the store are free of course. And i have some of her belongings still.” She prays at a stop Thing is stern, but culturally its a beg for forgiveness for shirrens “There are some things that i wish to keep.”
Eventually park, have a nice breakfast in idyllic town. Most of the buildings seem to be funded by Aleria Venn, or at least honored to her She is the mayor She was mayor when zmena was a kid, at least 45 at minimum rn Shes recently brought profits to the town Z: tharn, what all has happened since i was last here? Anything major?
“Major? Well, we’re building a new port that will hold deep water ships soon. No longer just a coastal town, but ones thatll be able to house freighters. We also found a decent amount of rares metals, zinc and the like. So we should start mining operations. Theres also talk of a nearby island having a Data-Temples.” As: confirmed? “Not confirmed, but a sailor supposedly shipwrecked there. It was last winter (about 300 days ago)” She talks abt more mundane stuff, weddings and the like, the fact that the bookstore is held aloft by her generous donations (the mayor) The mayor has kept most of these things afloat during her recent years Miku almado xep streaming, boba store Halfway thru the menu During miku performances, they dont shock almado
Good way to get a lot of local attention: local net. Niche localnets that are the equivalent to local broadcasting channel, instead of Infospheres u can send it up to the SCRBLE network With that level, a local celebrity makes their appearance: the mayor The mayor looks “which one is the manager?” Al: im the manager! And her best friend! Almado! She shakes his hand Some fuckass teenagers want in, miku kindly shames them for not being in school They dont start anything, but call out “narc” thats censored by xep She transfers 100 credits to almado Al: its so lucky we ran into u miss mayor, but we dont know all the best places of ur town! Could u tell us? “Well this Mundos is one of my favorites-” Xep researching her, emails miku good softball questions Can we see construction on new docks What sort of ppl come to town What are ur more scenic areas in town She takes them around town, to scenic diners, twin peaks esque town including personal ripperdocs that are here. Notable a kasatha that lost one of his arms got one replaced by the town’s funding Talks, he shies away from spotlike, he avoids miku and various questions He has shame and pity for almado, more akin to him losing his arms Cemetery Goes from diner to a rather unassuming cemetery. Someone tending the graves
The Priest of Xalaith, recognizes the bookstore owner. Looks at the rest of us “You must be the prodigal son.” Z: yes “Well… know that she wasnt worried abt you, she knew ud find her way” Z: very comforting to hear “If theres anything i could do for you, dont hesitate. (to the rest) who was she to you?” We’re just friends of his, not acquainted Goes to her grave, she does a prayer for her mom Wind howls, brings salt over clean graves. Priest “is your friend… normal?” 26: how do u mean? “There were rumors that he mightve been an astrazoan himself.” 26: we were not aware of these rumors “He was kidnapped by an astrazoan. But some of the more superstitious believed that the child was or was replaced by an astrazoan.” As: did he act strange after this kidnapping? “I dont think he knew he was kidnapped.” 26: if that is… it seems like these rumors are fairly unfounded then “Rumors often are.” 26: we do not know. We were not there. R: none of us were. As; what makes u believe that he was kidnapped? This is the first time we are hearing of it “He… the brother that helped attend to the bookstore was an astrazoan. Admitted to kidnapping a child. He attempted to flee.” 26: what happened to this brother? “He didnt leave through the roads, we know. So either he swam across the oceans or was brought across them.” 26: how curious. And it is believed that our companion here was the kidnapped child? “Who else would it be?” 26: i suppose thats true “I wont pry. It wasnt her wish to do so. She, at the very least, stopped the dna sampling of a child. Said it went against her religion.” 26: if you are against it, are there others who are not so against this investigation? Especially since he is back “Im sure u know how it is in a port town. You seem a smart lad.” 26: we are not a lad, but we are intelligent, thank you. “Plenty of murders go unsolved, plenty go in and out, plenty of paranoia. A lot of people will do whatever to quell such paranoia.” As: do you believe that he is perhaps in danger then? “No, because he is not an astrazoan. That is what you said, right?” 26: that is what we said. “Its been 20ish years. 10 years since he last lived in town.” “Could i offer you tea? Do u know if hed want any? I imagine the prayer will finish up soon.” Cafe Xep is going to pan the camera to the menu, some kind of transition where mikus not on camera Xep mentally: just so u all know, the one murdered by the astrazoan was this persons political opponent See if shes available for an appointment at town hall M: miss mayor would u be open to an interview later! Uve been so kind so far, id love to see who u are personally “Of course. That was going to be part of the tour. I wanted to do it midday since the light is perfect at the time. We have great skylights.” M: miku hasnt gotten a manicure before, but i wanna get one before it! X: miku how are u finding the iced tea here Miku is sending bubbles to go tell us abt the opponent Orb relays the message, during which party leaves to the chapel in the graveyard 2 shirrens are in the graveyard with the ocean, sound of the door slamming bc of the lashunta priest Shirren looks up “what… is this?” 26: apologies She raises a hand to greet the odd creature R: this is bubbles “What is bubbles?” As: a sapient purple orb Z: hes our friend “....why?” 26: bubbles why have u arrived at such speed Orb stares 26, telepathically: we can speak like this “The mayors political opponent was the one killed by the astrazoan.” 26: oh. Hm. Tells the rest of us. And also that miku is currently with the mayor Z: so u mentioned that the mayor is helping fund the bookstore? “Naturally.” Z: been mayor for a while “Shes a good mayor. She funds most of the town.” Z: have u met her? “Everyone’s met her. Shes no stranger. Its a small town, she comes into the store quite often. I can introduce you. If we need funding, she’ll give it to us.” Z: funding from taxes or? “Independently wealthy. She found some sort of data temple from my understanding. On some moon?” Z: what are the plans for the bookstore going forward? “More ppl are coming in id like them to be introduced. We mostly handle digital catelogs in the basement, but i prefer the physical copies up top. We also want a printing press, they make automatic ones.” Z: help from the mayor? “We’ve talked abt funding, yeha. It requires woodchips to operate. Which can be annoying to come by. Thankfully theres some oldfashioned man who wants to become a carpenter for some reason.” R: thats interesting, the printing press. Id love to see it if we’re able to stop by when its installed “Of course, u can print things out even. The modern ones can print out a book per minute.” “Itll be paperback of course, unless u have another material” She takes us back to the others “The motel here isnt the best, if u want we have the rooms upstairs. We also installed a small kitchen recently. U can make some basic stuff with it.” Z: we should be seeing you later. She goes to get some fresh fish, fresh bread, for dinner later See the mayor, who smiles at us “I noticed that on some of the cameras that they came on the same motorcycle you came in on. Are these your friends?” Xep cuts to a sponsored miku section She shakes all our hands She seems oddly familiar to asper ZMENA AND HER RECOGNIZE THAT THEYRE BOTH IN DISGUISES “Youre the kid that used to live above the bookshop!” Z: yes! You remember me? “Of course. Its not a big town. We’ve missed u here.” Z: its been quite a while “Well. we hope you enjoy your stay. That goes to all of you of course.” “Should we meet at the mayors hall at noon, then?” Al: thats good “Ill meet you all there. Make sure you bring all your friends, hatsune miku.” Miku ends the stream. We leave Turred approaches 26 “How did you make asper flinch?” 26: what? “The one around your thin neck?” 26: please elaborate “The little asper that floats around you?” (he did mention that when asper does things, he sees small asper spirits around the party if theyre around the network. He also notably calls them all asper. Occasionally they whisper in our ears from the group chat) 26: at what point did u see that asper flinch around us? Points at the diner, its pushed down by miku M: its not nice to point at people! “When talking to her.” 26: turred when u look at her, do u notice anything in particular? Anything u do not see with other people? Or anything u see with ppl in the party? “She kinda looks like the reporter form hedgehog day.” (lashunta woman who was conventionally attractive but not overly attractive.)
Asper is concerned about the Mayor making a fortune from a data temple and the fact that there is another one here. They can contain credicites and it’s also weird that the closer one wasnt found sooner. It’s so close to a town and found by a sailor that it’s a bit odd. Z: shes in some form of disguise, she also knows i am. I could tell she is too. Al: everyone knows we’re meeting with her X: but she cant deal with us. At least not immediately. Z: i want to go do this nonviolently, idk if shes an astrazoan. And if she is, i dont want to attack her R: could be some other shapeshifter. Like ragash Al: hatsune miku should we commit violence or no! I dont mean immediately, do u think we should commit violence M: miku does not condone violence???? X: thats why they have the hitman The 10th member of the network is no longer silenced Questions for the credicites Are you the one sending us these messages through our banks? 1 blink. Yes. Silenced again Was silenced for 16ish hours Are you trying to break our chains? Are you trying to be whole again? LEVEL UP

misc/particle-recycling-nanobots.html.title: Particle Recycling Nanobots
misc/particle-recycling-nanobots.html.description: Orbital space debris is usually handled by PaReN (Particle Recycling Nanobots) which decompose materials rapidly and when exposed to atmosphere the PaReN undergoes a magic based reaction destroying their enzyme capabilities and allowing the broken down element and molecule to fall to the nearest celestial body where they innately crawl into clumps to condense material before dying. Captains taking off from are advised to in orbit disable any remnant PaReN latent in the exosphere that may have clung to the ship during takeoff.

misc/system-connective-relay-bearer-for-.title: System Connective Relay Bearer for Long-distance Exchange
misc/system-connective-relay-bearer-for-.description: Live streaming is on a delay due to data speed limitations, on most planets with modern internet infrastructure this delay isn't noticeable. However, delays between streams on planets can reach the days mark, turning streamers into local celebrities. Large enough streamers are permitted to have their streams uploaded on System Connective Relay Bearer for Long-distance Exchange, most Solar System Network Administrations will allow the transmission of popular streams across spacetime through Remembrance Streams with a cut being taken by the administrations. Some streamers have taken to becoming a form of traveling act going to different systems and planetary orbits in order to provide live streams to fanbases built in other regions (and sometimes to escape controversy and allegations in former solar systems). Streams are also available for transfer across systems usually for a substantial fee.
misc/system-connective-relay-bearer-for-.sourcePath: Misc/System Connective Relay Bearer for Long-distance Exchange.md

sessions/epitaph-protocol/session-18.htm.title: Session 18
sessions/epitaph-protocol/session-18.htm.description:
Prev: Session 17
Next: Session 19
Auchenda, Arkari
Asper asks Kalervo Turred what the aspers do Choking necks - mostly just clinging on Do physically touch the person but cant enter Al: turred buddy wheres mine! “Me point?” Al: yes please! Reaches hand into miku, inbetween mouth and head Almado cant touch it He points at all of them, at least all of them are in the same place except almado bc it had to shove itself into the head. Most just hang out around the neck and shoulder region “They whisper into ear and heal us. Theyre making love.”
“I’m going to go with the others. Voz Ricander and Halrex Korr. They have motel room.” Al: can i have my phone back! Is yours working now! He presses the button on his own phone, still fried He heads on out Zmena wasnt Actually kidnapped “he left to protect me. There were rumors going on about shapeshifters and it was- there were rumors.” R: there are rumors Z: still? R: yeah. They think ur one as well. The bookstore owner stopped folks from getting you dna tested. She said it went against her religion but it hasnt stopped ppl from presuming Z: she never mentioned any of that. I didnt realize they were still suspecting me after he left? We prob shouldnt stay here too
Dakine “do you mind if i got to the interview with you all? If its going to be livestreamed anyways, u better have a professional camera around.” We agree, its likely shes looking for info or looking out for us
Interview with the Mayor Aleria Venn Guards here Why did you want to become mayor
“I grew up in a nearby town, i wanted to bring the wealth back to the community. I found my money in a data-vault.” shes thriving nowadays What have you accomplished since becoming mayor She bankrolls failing businesses, in return she rules the area as a pseudo lord. More like a patron of the arts What are your thoughts on the anti shapeshifting laws “Theyre an unfortunate necessity in times where people don’t trust each other. I’m sure you understand.” There is one motive there that almado understands. Profit, of course. Al: just good business “What was that?” Al: sorry! I said smth off record! Im sorry! “It is a conglomeration that holds it up. It falls under the nearby bay of cities that rule this part of the planet. It would require a unanimous decision to revoke said laws.” What are your goals for the future of this city “My plan is to incorporate those cities into my own.” M: how? “Theyre beginning to falter. One of their mayors didnt even show up to his inauguration M: was he sick? “I believe he may have fallen off a pier. Idk. maybe he was on his way and the lasagna was in his oven, he realized he left it on, and he ran back.” Al: just to be clear, the mayor hasnt been seen since? “Of course not.” M: thats so tragic! “He was a close friend of mine, of course.” M: im sure he was! (friends like almado and miku.) “I can deafen them, if you wish. Some people get shy. Besides, its basic procedures for soldiers such as this.” Asper asks abt the data-vault “I was exploring the new system of arlenom. We got lucky with a scan, and the rest is history”
(Arlenom System is a far reaches recent aetherion space where a colony ship was next slated to go.) As: what did you find within? “Data of course, i sold it to the nearest broker.” M: u werent curious? “Oh i know it. But if you want to know it, you have to buy it from them.” “Now why have you deemed it fit to stop at my planet? Is it because youre travelling with one of our old locals?” Z: i wanted to visit home “Where have you been?” Z: i was off getting an education “Where?”
Z: Ksate “Where were you getting education?” Z: one of the universities. Why? “I have friends at k’sate. I play politics at a much larger scale than this. U mightve run into one of my peers. Esp if you took any civics classes.” R: what were their names? Im an anthropology major
Z: Myrrhex Institute of the Infinite (small ping in the air that goes silent as some of the equipment blinks for a second.)
“Ore-17.” (heard of him, didnt take him, for upperclassmen. Android that had been there since 2nd iteration. Each time going thru renewal, the new one studies a different culture) R: i didnt have the privilege, but it was v interesting, i may contact them for resources and info “Of course. He is a lovely man. Have you ever stopped by the department for coffee before?” R: not a coffee man unfortunately “Its an old fashioned drink, but he does appreciate it.” R: ive tried it but eh “Does it not affect you as it does humans?” R: i get the jitters Odd spinning particles behind her Sign of wealth. Its powered by credits This is enough credits that you could buy ur way out of aetherion corp
It reminds ripley of the little odd symmetry, light inside, made out of credits. It looks eerily similar to the ground/floor of kiliv-vi “The last android that tried to touch it…” looks solemn “is no longer with us.” Something hidden under the surface, but that part is the truth M: do u know why its so volatile? “Ur made of credits, and its likely stronger than ur wills. Similar to a being of flesh having a dominate spell being put upon them. Its not necessarily that youre weak, but it affects you exclusively instead of us.” Almado stares at painting Paparazzi mssg almado “there’s a secret door behind the painting.” Al: wheres the activator or switch “No clue.” “How do you feel about your kidnapper? We never got the chance to ask you.” Z: odd. Kinda traumatic for me. Little hard to talk about “Yes, but if we’re to change laws, we have to know how the victims feel.” Z: complicated for me. The shapeshifter was the only one that i- i thought he was my brother at the time. So it was difficult for me to realize my life was a lie, in that moment
“You still had Hevkono, did you not?” Z: ur right, and she was family to me. Its just- you might not know how it is when theres someone whos close to u did smth so terrible. Ur childhood was a lie “So youre saying we shouldnt forgive them?” Z: i have complicated feelings about the matter, i do think everyone can change. He never harmed me physically. I dont exactly know what he attempted to gain. But it hurt emotionally, was a lot to process. As far as forgiveness.. I have mixed feelings. Ive never been able to come up with a proper answer. (staring her down hard) At some point, gets a message from dakine “dont overcorrect. Liars often overcorrect by doing excessive eye contact.” “If there’s nothing else, should we adjourn here?” Z: what are ur plans changing the laws? “If there are no incidents, id like to relax them. But if there are, we’d have to enforce again. Im glad u see it as reasonable.” Z: i just think the train of logic makes sense “Of course. Its the aedryn way, we follow logic and democracy thru slow and incremental change.” Asper asks abt the data temple nearby “It would be fortunate, but unfortunately the sailor that reported it went comatose. It would be a wonderful windfall for the nearby community.” (its a lot of info, u have to do a lot of steps to prepare for it) (zmena has a feeling that he could catch her off guard by asking boldly abt the shapeshifting) (fun fact: almado’s homeplanet grew coffee)
Starbucks = Moondough, niceish, oldfashioned somewhat Almado miku asper leave, rip zmena stay She dismisses her 2 guards “Is there a final question off the record?” Z: i wanted to talk. We both know whats going on, to a level. Youre a shapeshifter, as am i. “That’s a wild accusation, but continue.” Z: the shapeshifter we talked about, my brother. Do u know what happened? “Idk what happened. But i know who does. He lives by the docks in the ocean. They might have registers there.” Z: name?
“Name? No. company? Yes. The Peltragow Shipping Company.” Z: i wont cause trouble. I have heard the rumors. Ppl are still suspecting me? “Most forgot, until you arrived.” Z: makes sense. How long can we stay before we have to laeve? “U could stay for 2 weeks. Its a small town, they wont ask. Not without prompting.” Z: i’ll keep a low profile. Before we leave. Ur contact information? “The public office’s phone.” Almado asks voz abt spaceships and low air travel “Yes??? Why” Al: we’re just thinking abt doing highspeed low altitude flying
“Highspeed, no, low, yes. Ship is meant to go highspeed in 0 gravity.” “Theres smth i meant to talk abt this town. Its a little bit creepy-” call disconnects. Call him back, and phone rings on Try calling korr, feel odd air as she picks up drunkenly “asper” As: hello. Are you with voz? “He’s downstairs, one second.” As: are you alright? “Just wasnt expecting to be awake for another… six hours.” As: sorry Shes so drunk and hungover, stumbles downstairs Hear the sound of turred talking to voz, phone gets shuffled over to him As: u were trying to warn us of smth? “We finished the conversation?” As: huh “We talked for a bit about how the town was-” call disconnects Scurry to cheap motel Waffle house-esque
Pancake Home Turred voz are eating and korr is barely coherent, shoving down hashbrowns Paparazzi follows us slowly on her motorcycle “You should really buy a car.” As: its on the docket “Why not steal one?” M: stealings bad Z: not doing it here “Why not? One of these people is the one that sold out ur brother” Z: we’re keeping a low profile “You always keep a low profile if you steal successfully. Thats the point of stealing.” Turred waves We approach, its a seat urself situation Voz pays for us “Is there something you want?” As: our communication keeps getting disrupted “It didnt. We talked twice.” As: the call kept getting disconnected “Have you tried having a less copyable voice?” As: no “Ok. maybe some inflection?” Voz “doctor diagnosis?” Korr “technomancer. Likely gained access to your unit at some point. Not ours. Thats why it only works one way.” Almado tries to call voz, it connects Al: there’s something abt the town, its so goddamn weird- (call disconnects) Tactical xep “Weird” and “town” are able to be flagged. Can copy asper, but not miku or ripley Ripley thinking abt vocal installation Some androids have damaged or old voice modules which mean they cant. But even if they have the capability, some need to train into using it. Too variable of an answer. Usually a form of “it kinda depends man” R: can u tell us whats weird? Voz points at korr “I tried doing some good. Lots of equipment for checking dna back in medical staff.” R: makes sense “Yeah but why wouldnt they use it if theyre hunting for shapechangers.” 26 can relay the info abt the mayor being a shapechanger “The issue is, they were partially issued. On all exits outside of the docks.”
Zmena gets a text from tharn, asking if he’s coming home for dinner Weird bc she said shed get fish and bread for dinner earlier Zmena texts back abt chicken if its not trouble “Maybe tomorrow i’ll get it for you at the market?” Zmena tries to video call her, no response Almado wants to leave town Z: im not leaving town, not yet. Smth weird is going on, i want to go check on her Al: well. Ig ur the boss in this case To the bookstore Lights are still on, store is closed tho. Almado smells something burning, kicks down the door Asper zmena sneak backdoor Almado miku rip in the front Burning smell is in the kitchen Backroom has books and personal items Almado opens the door to the kitchen, sees the oven smoking with burnt fish. Alongside a woman shot 15 times in the back with a semi-auto pistol Shes been face down for an hour They’re framing zmena The texts are gone There are devices you can create to act like towers where the databank is, so it wont go up to a satellite Zmena changes to nivaya. There is a sudden flash in the kitchen from a corner. Pictures taken, 1 as he was, 1 as a starfish, 1 as nivaya Special spy camera, meant to disintegrate. Camera burns away so u dont know where it was sent. Likely has a dummy sim card Tactical xep, if we take him to a radio tower he might be able to get it. Obv wont stop it from being sent, but find out where it was sent. Zmena goes up and finds that the 2 shirrens made a photo album, 1 of the 2 brothers, then zmena and the woman, then woman and her daughter, then daughter Box left with fake name of gymic Almado steals her car She died happy, the last thing she saw was gymic before being shot in the back of the neck Xep drives us away just as the red and blue lights go to the bookstore
One of aspers connections is moving and Fast. its going to the docks. Flies past the docks, onward and onward to an island
GO MY ORB TELL THE OTHERS WHATS HAPPENING The others will meet us wherever we go Go to the docks Group of men is working One looks at the van, looks at us Red dragonkin stands tall “Now whats wrong?” M: we’re just passing thru “Thats interesting. Thats the van that gets book. But shes not here, is she? And its an odd hour to get books from the docks, no?” M: we were just borrowing it “What ship?” M: peltragow “My company. Which of you can pass the dna scan?” “Anyone that cant, walk out before i start scanning these people Zmena scurries out He scans the rest of us, tho confused abt bubbles bc no dna Gets us on a tanker, makes sure that our party members will go where we all go Hides zmena in a shipping container Various workers pull out rifles and begin shooting zmena
Rolami Ta “You’re an idiot like he was.” Zmena goes unconscious in the shipping container, illusion is broken, people scanning disappear from reality We can track him wherever he goes. Gwuh tho

sessions/epitaph-protocol/session-19.htm.title: Session 19
sessions/epitaph-protocol/session-19.htm.description:
Prev: Session 18
Next: Session 20
Auchenda, Arkari
We wait for Voz Ricander Halrex Korr Kalervo Turred ayla Dakine, and bubbles Voz asks “what type of ship was he taken on?” Basic trawler “Ok, we’re stealing 2 boats.” As: why? “We’re going to ram up its slip with one boat.” He draws it out real fast “One group goes down to disable the engine, the other group has turred to get nivaya. If theyre capturing shapechangers, theyll have dna scanners. Korr will stay on the boats” We’re gonna steal a personal businessman boat bc coke and also better cared for Xep doesnt pilot the boat amazingly, has weird muscle memory Korr takes coke
Korr asks asper “can you contact captain siryu?” Uhhh via text but too far away for network Has miku try to counter act the technomancer hacking for texting
Slam in, enter combat with Peltragow Shipping Company
Hynarion Circle Aspirants are here??? Root network can work even on metal (move allies up to their speed)
Rolami Ta Screaming of metal bending Special abilities Dragonkin have the ability to call and talk to partner, tho if theyre strong it can be miles and miles (likely talking to the mayor) Highest save Fortitude Lowest save Reflex Highest rank of spells 3rd What a terrible combat We go down below to help smash
1 peculiar lack of something: this seems to be a tech advanced thing, using a mix of slight fission to fuel the boat. Weird with the computers not having any Aetherion Corporation tech Incredibly low chances, aetherion makes the most cutting edge tech During the war aetherion corp sold to their enemies at an upcharge Almado takes the guy’s phone We take the cocaine boat and leave Sail away 1 message telling “some ship went down to the path that your ship was going to go. An interception. It looks heavily armed.” Handoff situation Traditional smuggling operation They had a lack of 1 thing we expected, but didnt have to go far. Didnt have a cryochamber, for moving human cargo Almado gets cocaine and activates the Cocaine Jingle We go follow the network signal on the boat, to a small island, takes abt 6 hours
Almado ponders 26’s cultivation technique
Voz tries to open the hatch of our ship, it doesnt open Doesnt open for asper either The ship is out of fuel?
Credicites are 500meters away still
Miku finds a mechanical labyrinth, Data-Temple Dont enter bc u need a ritual to enter without scrambling ur minds ASPER does the ritual but nat 1s it twice Send almado in, hall starts talking, hes Fine At the end of the hallway is a drop with an elevator, he calls it Voices in his head “Youre a new biological form.” “You belong not to a species, but an individuality.” Almado experiences coke psychosis and data madness Almado returns, steaming; he was partially digitized Offer up data willingly, easier if you cut it off instead of being ripped off Can cause cracked skin if digitization doesnt put u back normally We all offer up a secret, which can be removed if smth fucks up while we’re in there

info_showOrphanNodes.description: Show nodes that are not connected to any other nodes.

info_showAttachments.description: Show attachments like images and PDFs as nodes in the graph.

info_allowGlobalGraph.description: Allow the user to view the global graph of all nodes.

info_allowExpand.description: Allow the user to pop-out the graph view to take up the whole screen

info_attractionForce.description: How much should linked nodes attract each other? This will make the graph appear more clustered.

info_linkLength.description: How long should the links between nodes be? The shorter the links the more connected nodes will cluster together.

info_repulsionForce.description: How much should nodes repel each other? This will make disconnected parts more spread out.

info_centralForce.description: How much should nodes be attracted to the center? This will make the graph appear more dense and circular.

info_edgePruning.description: Edges with a length above this threshold will not be rendered, however they will still contribute to the simulation. This can help large tangled graphs look more organised. Hovering over a node will still display these links.

info_minNodeRadius.description: How small should the smallest nodes be? The smaller a node is the less it will attract other nodes.

info_maxNodeRadius.description: How large should the largest nodes be? Nodes are sized by how many links they have. The larger a node is the more it will attract other nodes. This can be used to create a good grouping around the most important nodes.

info_allowResizing.description: Whether or not to allow the sidebars to be resized

info_allowCollapsing.description: Whether or not to allow the sidebars to be collapsed

info_rightDefaultWidth.description: The default width of the right sidebar

info_leftDefaultWidth.description: The default width of the left sidebar

info_sourcePath.description: The local path to the source .html file which will be included.

info_allowFoldingLists.description: Whether or not to allow lists to be folded

info_allowFoldingHeadings.description: Whether or not to allow headings to be folded

info_siteUrl.description: The url that this site will be hosted at

info_authorName.description: The name of the author of the site
